Existing automated approaches attempt to detect navigation issues using exploration agents and reinforcement learning techniques. However, since these methods rely on the navigation data itself or evaluate navigation behavior indirectly, they do not explicitly verify whether the navigation representation reflects the walkable space defined by underlying geometry.
  This paper presents a framework for validating navigation meshes through an independent, geometry-driven analysis of navmesh correctness. The approach reconstructs walkable space directly from environment geometry using a voxel-based representation, followed by constraint-aware traversal and connectivity evaluation. Validation is formulated as a prioritized search problem over the voxel space, where reinforcement learning guides sampling toward regions more likely to exhibit inconsistencies. At each sampled location, reachability derived from the voxel representation is compared against reachability obtained from the navmesh via engine-level queries. Experiments across multiple large-scale open-world game environments show that the approach consistently lowers exploration effort while maintaining similar defect detection coverage. The framework runs offline within the game engine and can be integrated into automated quality assurance pipelines. Since the method relies on geometry, it can be adapted across game engines with minimal changes, making it suitable for production deployment.

</details>


### [255] [Stdlib or Third-Party? Empirical Performance and Correctness of LLM-Assisted Zero-Dependency Python Libraries](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21405)
*Peng Ding,Rick Stevens*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文通过 zerodep 项目（40+ 模块，纯 Python 标准库重实现第三方库），系统性评估了仅用标准库替代第三方库的可行性与性能。结果表明，多数场景下性能差距在 2 倍以内，部分场景甚至因省去第三方库架构开销而获得 5-115 倍加速，性能瓶颈主要来自 C 扩展而非纯 Python 库本身。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 第三方 Python 库带来依赖管理开销、供应链风险和部署摩擦，作者想探究仅用 Python 标准库能在多大程度上复现第三方生态，以及在正确性和性能上的代价。

Method: 通过 zerodep 项目，在 LLM 辅助下开发了 40+ 个单文件、无外部依赖、API 兼容的标准库纯 Python 重实现模块，覆盖 12 个类别（序列化、网络、密码学等），并进行系统化基准测试。

Result: 大部分场景下 stdlib-only 实现性能与参考库持平（2 倍以内）；性能悬崖主要来自 C 扩展（图像处理、二进制序列化、底层密码学）；部分模块因避免第三方库架构开销反而获得 5-115 倍加速。

Conclusion: 标准库在多数场景足以胜任，LLM 在严格符号约束下能生成正确高性能代码，但需要人工迭代修正。该工作对无依赖软件工程有启示意义。

Abstract: Third-party Python libraries introduce dependency management overhead, supply chain risk, and deployment friction in constrained environments. A natural question is how much of this ecosystem can be replicated using only Python's standard library -- and at what correctness and performance cost. We address this empirically through zerodep, a growing collection of single-file Python modules, each a stdlib-only reimplementation of a popular third-party library, developed with LLM assistance under strict constraints: no external imports, single file, drop-in API compatibility, and mandatory correctness validation against the reference library. Spanning over 40 modules across 12 categories -- including serialization, networking, cryptography, agent protocols, and text processing -- zerodep provides a controlled testbed for two interrelated questions: (1) Where does the stdlib suffice? and (2) Can LLMs effectively generate correct, performant code under tight symbolic constraints? Systematic benchmarking shows that stdlib-only implementations achieve performance parity (within 2x of the reference) in the majority of cases. The primary performance cliff is C-extension-backed computation (image processing, binary serialization, low-level crypto), not the inherent overhead of pure-Python third-party libraries. Conversely, many widely-used libraries carry architectural overhead that LLM-generated stdlib reimplementations avoid, yielding 5--115x speedups in several categories. We characterize the stdlib capability boundary across complexity tiers and library categories, discuss where LLM-assisted development succeeds and where it requires iterative human correction, and examine implications for dependency-free software engineering at scale. zerodep is open-source at https://github.com/Oaklight/zerodep.

</details>


### [256] [Agentic Model Checking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21434)
*Youcheng Sun,Jiawen Liu,Daniel Kroening,Jason Xue*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出"智能体模型检测"范式：LLM智能体负责语义判断（规范推断、检查选择、反例分类、改进提议），而有界模型检测（BMC）后端负责所有与可靠性相关的决策，形成"智能体提议，求解器验证"的协同框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM生成的系统代码难以验证：错误普遍存在、缺乏形式化规范、安全契约隐式编码在调用点而非在函数边界强制执行。

Method: 提出"智能体模型检测"范式，包含三个核心承诺：(1) 从调用者上下文自顶向下推断规范，使用受限DSL；(2) 组合化验证，每个函数独立检查，用后置条件约束的桩替换被调用者；(3) 反例经过验证流水线（可达性、被调用者可行性、动态重放、真实性审计），建模伪影驱动改进循环。

Result: 实例化为BMC-Agent，在LLM生成的C/Rust内核和编译器代码以及经过OSS-Fuzz锤炼的成熟库上评估，确认了真实缺陷，在重度模糊测试的表面产生了有界干净验证，并在选定的算法函数上建立了功能等价性。

Conclusion: "智能体提议，求解器验证"的范式能有效应对LLM生成代码的验证挑战，通过LLM与形式化方法的协同分工实现可扩展的组合化验证。

Abstract: Verifying LLM-generated systems code is hard: bugs are prevalent, formal specifications are missing, and safety contracts are encoded implicitly at call sites rather than enforced at function boundaries. We propose agentic model checking, a paradigm that couples LLM agents with a bounded model checking backend under the principle agents propose, solvers verify: agents handle tasks requiring semantic judgment (spec inference, check selection, counterexample classification, refinement proposal) while BMC discharges every soundness-relevant decision. The paradigm rests on three commitments. Specifications are inferred top-down from caller context in a restricted DSL that translates deterministically into the backend's assume/assert primitives, with optional functional-correctness clauses lifting verification from panic-freeness to behavioural faithfulness. Verification is compositional: each function is checked in isolation against its spec with callees replaced by postcondition-constrained stubs, so per-query cost scales with a single function's state space and refinements propagate automatically to callers. Counterexamples are not bug reports: they pass through a validation pipeline (reachability, callee feasibility, dynamic replay, realism audit) that distinguishes active in-tree crashes from latent public-API failures, while modelling artifacts drive a refinement loop rather than being suppressed. We instantiate the approach in BMC-Agent and evaluate it on LLM-generated kernel and compiler code in C and Rust alongside mature OSS-Fuzz-hardened libraries, confirming real defects, producing bounded clean verifications on heavily-fuzzed surfaces, and establishing functional equivalence on selected algorithmic functions.

</details>


### [257] [Quality and Security Signals in AI-Generated Python Refactoring Pull Requests](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21453)
*Mohamed Almukhtar,Anwar Ghammam,Hua Ming*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本研究通过对AIDev数据集中Python重构PR的实证分析，发现AI代理提交的代码在22.5%的变更中提升了质量属性（尤其是可用性提升36.5%），但24.17%的修改文件引入了新的Pylint问题（主要是长行等约定违规），4.7%引入了新的Bandit安全问题。尽管存在这些问题，73.5%的PR被合并。研究还归纳了24种常见变更操作及其与代码质量问题的关联。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前缺乏关于AI代理在真实项目中重构变更的质量和风险特征的实证证据，特别是对可维护性、代码质量和安全性的影响尚不明确。

Method: 基于AIDev数据集中的Python重构PR，使用PyQu（基于ML的Python质量评估工具）分析五个质量属性变化，并辅以Pylint和Bandit进行静态分析与安全检测，对变更前后进行对比测量。

Result: 代理提交在22.5%的变更中提升了质量属性（可用性表现最佳达36.5%）；24.17%的文件引入新Pylint问题（以约定类违规为主），4.7%引入新Bandit安全问题；归纳出24种常见变更操作；73.5%的PR被合并，即使引入新的问题。

Conclusion: AI代理重构有潜力但存在局限性，需要更强的工具辅助质量和安全把关来优化AI驱动开发工作流。

Abstract: As AI agents increasingly contribute to code development and maintenance, there is still limited empirical evidence on the quality and risk characteristics of their changes in real-world projects, particularly for refactoring-oriented contributions. It remains unclear how agent-authored refactoring edits affect maintainability, code quality, and security once merged into GitHub repositories. To address this gap, we conduct an empirical study of Python refactoring pull requests (PRs) from the AIDev dataset. We analyze agentic refactoring PRs using PyQu, an ML-based quality assessment tool for Python, to quantify changes across five quality attributes, and we complement PyQu with domain-independent static analysis (Pylint and Bandit) to measure code quality and security issues before and after each change.
  Our results show that, on average, agentic commits improve a quality attribute in 22.5% of the studied changes, with usability improving most frequently (36.5%). At the same time, 24.17% of modified files introduce new Pylint issues predominantly convention level violations such as long lines-while 4.7% introduce new Bandit findings. From the observed diffs, we derive a taxonomy of 24 recurring change operations and map them to the lint and security findings they most commonly affect. Despite these mixed outcomes, developer acceptance is high: 73.5% of the analyzed PRs are merged, including cases that introduce new lint or security findings, often alongside the removal of existing issues. Overall, these findings highlight both the promise and current limitations of agentic refactoring, and motivate stronger tool-in-the-loop quality and security gating for AI-driven development workflows.

</details>


### [258] [ProcBench: Evaluating Process-Level Defects and Control Preservation in LLM Coding Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20251)
*Jiawei He,Jie Jia,Chenbo Liu,Chaoyi Xue,Yapeng Song,Xikai Yang,Dong Sun*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出ProcBench，一个评估编码智能体执行过程缺陷的框架，通过标准化轨迹表示和校准风险评分卡，超越传统最终结果评估，在三个基准上验证了其效用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有编码智能体基准仅关注最终结果（如任务完成率、测试通过率），无法捕捉多步执行中反复出现的过程级失败，缺乏对执行过程的可见性。

Method: ProcBench包含三个核心组件：①可复用的执行失败本体论；②将异构日志标准化为统一轨迹表示；③基于校准风险评分卡的报告机制。在200条标注轨迹上实例化，并在AndroidBench、TerminalBench、SWE-bench-Verified三个基准上验证。

Result: ProcBench可被可靠实例化；校准相比直接阈值化提高了缺陷发现的实证可解释性；过程感知评分卡提供了超越传统结果评估的诊断区分能力。

Conclusion: ProcBench为编码智能体提供了过程级别的评估视角，但存在标注依赖、部分缺陷类别的部分可观测性等局限，需要更广泛的外部验证。

Abstract: Existing benchmarks for LLM coding agents mainly evaluate final outcomes, such as task completion, compilation success, and test pass rates. While these metrics are useful for measuring end-task capability, they provide limited visibility into how an execution unfolds and often miss recurrent process-level failures that arise during multi-step operation. We present ProcBench, a benchmark-oriented framework for evaluating coding-agent trajectories through process defects and control preservation. ProcBench organizes execution failures into a reusable ontology, standardizes heterogeneous logs into a unified trajectory representation, and reports calibrated risk-based scorecards instead of relying only on final outcomes. We instantiate ProcBench on an annotated set of 200 trajectories and apply it across three coding-agent benchmarks: AndroidBench, TerminalBench, and SWE-bench-Verified. Our results suggest that ProcBench can be instantiated with useful reliability, that calibration improves the empirical interpretability of defect findings relative to direct thresholding, and that process-aware scorecards provide diagnostic distinctions beyond conventional outcome-based evaluation. We also discuss limitations, including annotation dependence, partial observability for some defect classes, and the need for broader external validation.

</details>


### [259] [Agentic Agile-V: From Vibe Coding to Verified Engineering in Software and Hardware Development](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20456)
*Christopher Koch*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出Agentic Agile-V框架，认为自主代码生成的核心问题不再是提示工程，而是工程过程控制，通过SCOPE-V循环将对话意图转化为结构化工件和验收证据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前自主AI编码系统虽能加速开发，但控制研究表明效果异质——企业任务有收益、成熟开源项目反而变慢、硬件验证持续失败。作者认为问题已从提示工程转向工程过程控制，缺乏系统的过程框架来管理AI代理的工程活动。

Method: 综合来自代理软件工程、GitHub规模采用研究、仓库级代理配置、生产力试验、问题解决基准和硬件/RTL验证研究的证据；提出Agentic Agile-V框架，以Agile-V为生命周期主干，内嵌SCOPE-V循环（Specify, Constrain, Orchestrate, Prove, Evolve, Verify）将对话意图转化为结构化工件和验收证据。

Result: 贡献了四项成果：(i) 面向代理软件、固件和硬件工作的最小输入工件分类法；(ii) 对话到契约的门控机制，隔离探索性对话与实现执行；(iii) 风险自适应的功能开发、缺陷修复、测试和硬件工作流；(iv) 基于证据包的代理生成工件验收模型。

Conclusion: 代理AI并未消除工程纪律，反而提升了需求、约束、可追溯性、独立验证和人工审批的价值。工程过程控制是让自主编码系统可靠产生价值的关键。

Abstract: Agentic AI coding systems can inspect repositories, plan implementation steps, edit files, call tools, run tests, and submit pull requests. These capabilities make software and hardware development faster in some settings, but current evidence does not support the simple claim that autonomous code generation automatically improves engineering outcomes. Controlled studies report productivity gains in some enterprise tasks, slowdowns in mature open-source work, moderate but heterogeneous meta-analytic effects, and persistent failures in repository setup, dependency handling, permission gating, and hardware verification. This paper argues that the central problem is no longer prompt engineering; it is engineering process control. It synthesizes evidence from agentic software engineering, GitHub-scale adoption studies, repository-level agent configuration, productivity trials, issue-resolution benchmarks, and hardware/RTL verification research. It proposes Agentic Agile-V, a process framework that uses Agile-V as the lifecycle backbone and a task-level SCOPE-V loop - Specify, Constrain, Orchestrate, Prove, Evolve, and Verify - to convert conversational intent into structured engineering artifacts and acceptance evidence. The paper contributes: (i) a taxonomy of minimum input artifacts for agentic software, firmware, and hardware work; (ii) a conversation-to-contract gate that separates exploratory dialogue from implementation; (iii) risk-adaptive feature, bug-fix, testing, and hardware workflows; and (iv) an evidence-bundle acceptance model for agent-generated artifacts. The paper concludes that agentic AI does not eliminate engineering discipline; it increases the value of requirements, constraints, traceability, independent verification, and human approval.

</details>


<div id='cs.LG'></div>

# cs.LG [[Back]](#toc)

### [260] [Neural Estimation of Pairwise Mutual Information in Masked Discrete Sequence Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20187)
*Jai Sharma,Yifan Wang,Bryan Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种从预训练掩码扩散模型隐状态中直接估计条件互信息的神经框架，通过单次前向传播预测完整MI矩阵，实现MI引导的并行解码，在数独和蛋白质序列生成任务上减少3-5倍推理时间且保持生成质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 掩码扩散模型无法显式表示变量间的依赖关系，限制了可解释性和高效生成，需要一种能捕捉模型内部依赖结构的方法。

Method: 从预训练MDM的隐状态中估计成对条件互信息，以模型自身条件分布计算的MI作为监督信号，单次前向传播即可预测完整MI矩阵，进而识别条件独立子集实现并行解码。

Result: 在数独和ESM-C蛋白质序列生成任务中，MI图恢复了已知结构约束，推理时前向传播次数比顺序解码减少3-5倍，生成质量优于基于熵的并行化方法。

Conclusion: 提出的MI估计框架能有效捕获MDM内部的依赖结构，在不牺牲生成质量的前提下大幅提升解码效率，为可解释性和高效生成提供了新思路。

Abstract: Understanding dependencies between variables is critical for interpretability and efficient generation in masked diffusion models (MDMs), yet these models primarily expose marginal conditional distributions and do not explicitly represent inter-variable dependence. We propose a neural framework for estimating pairwise conditional mutual information (MI) directly from the hidden states of a pretrained MDM, using ground-truth MI computed from the model's own conditional distributions for supervision. The resulting estimator captures the model's internal belief about dependency structure and predicts the full MI matrix in a single forward pass, enabling MI-guided parallel decoding by identifying conditionally independent subsets of variables. We evaluate our approach on Sudoku and protein sequence generation with ESM-C, where the MI maps recover known structural constraints and enable a 3-5x magnitude reduction in inference-time forward passes compared to sequential decoding, while preserving generative quality and outperforming entropy-based parallelization methods.

</details>


### [261] [GraphDiffMed: Knowledge-Constrained Differential Attention with Pharmacological Graph Priors for Medication Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20188)
*Krati Saxena,Tomohiro Shibata*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: GraphDiffMed 是一个基于双尺度差分注意力（Differential Attention v2）和药理知识约束的用药推荐框架，通过在访问内和访问间两个层面过滤噪声信号，在 MIMIC-III 数据集上实现了更优的推荐质量与安全性平衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法难以同时兼顾跨就诊时间建模与药理知识整合（如药物相互作用），且患者轨迹存在长序列、噪声大、临床异质性高等挑战，亟需一种既能有效抑制噪声又能融入药理约束的推荐方案。

Method: 提出 GraphDiffMed 框架，核心是双尺度差分注意力（Differential Attention v2），在访问内（intra-visit）和访问间（inter-visit）两个层面过滤虚假信号；同时在学习过程中融入药理知识约束（如药物相互作用）。实验仅使用人口统计学辅助特征即可达到最佳性能。

Result: 在 MIMIC-III 数据集上的实验和消融研究表明，该方法在推荐质量和排序指标上持续优于强基线模型，同时实现了更优的安全性-性能平衡。

Conclusion: 将噪声感知的注意力机制与药理约束相结合，能够产生更可靠、更具临床意义的用药推荐。

Abstract: Recommending safe and effective medication combinations from electronic health records (EHRs) is a core clinical AI problem, yet it remains difficult because patient trajectories are long, noisy, and clinically heterogeneous. Existing methods typically excel at either temporal modeling across visits or pharmacological knowledge integration (e.g., drug-drug interactions, DDIs), but rarely achieve both while robustly suppressing noise. We present GraphDiffMed, a knowledge-constrained medication recommendation framework built on dual-scale Differential Attention v2. Differential attention is applied at both intra-visit and inter-visit levels to filter spurious signals within encounters and across longitudinal history, while pharmacological constraints are incorporated during learning. Experiments on MIMIC-III and ablation studies show that this design consistently improves recommendation quality and ranking over strong baselines while achieving a more favorable safety performance balance. We further find that the strongest-performing configuration uses only demographic auxiliary features under our experimental setting. Overall, GraphDiffMed demonstrates that combining noise-aware attention with pharmacological constraints yields more reliable and clinically meaningful medication recommendation. We open-source our code at https://github.com/saxenakrati09/GraphDiffMed.

</details>


### [262] [Dynamic Shapley Computation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20620)
*Xuan Yang,Hsi-Wen Chen,Ming-Syan Chen,Jian Pei*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出D-Shap框架，将Shapley值表示为任务-玩家矩阵，利用局部性实现动态数据估值的高效更新，速度提升达三个数量级。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统Shapley数据估值计算成本高，在任务和训练玩家动态变化的场景下无法复用，每次变动都需要完全重新计算。

Method: 将Shapley值建模为玩家×任务矩阵，利用效用局部性和联盟局部性（任务依赖少量玩家、相似任务估值相似），通过结构感知插值更新新任务，限制新玩家仅影响局部矩阵块；引入self-valuation从训练数据构建初始矩阵，结合子集复用和覆盖感知锚点选择。

Result: 任务更新毫秒级完成，玩家更新成本降低三个数量级，估值质量与完全重算持平。

Conclusion: D-Shap将动态数据估值转化为结构化矩阵维护问题，大幅降低计算开销，适用于动态场景下的数据贡献量化。

Abstract: Shapley-based data valuation provides a principled way to quantify the contribution of training data, but its high computational cost makes it impractical in dynamic settings where tasks and training players evolve. Existing methods treat Shapley computation as a one-shot process and collapse contributions into aggregated scores, preventing reuse and requiring recomputation under any change. We introduce a new perspective that represents Shapley values as a player-by-task matrix and formulates dynamic valuation as a structured matrix maintenance problem. We exploit the fact that each task depends on a small subset of training players and that similar tasks yield similar valuations, leading to utility locality and coalition locality. Based on these insights, we propose D-Shap, a dynamic valuation framework that enables efficient updates by modifying only a small portion of the matrix: new task valuations are inferred via structure-aware interpolation, while updates induced by new players are confined to affected local matrix blocks. To eliminate the need for pre-specified evaluation tasks, we introduce self-valuation, which constructs the initial matrix directly from training data, supported by scalable subset reuse and coverage-aware anchor selection. Experiments across diverse models show that D-Shap performs task updates in milliseconds and reduces the cost of player updates by up to three orders of magnitude, while achieving valuation quality competitive with full recomputation.

</details>


### [263] [TabPFN-MT: A Natively Multitask In-Context Learner for Tabular Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20234)
*Cormac Cureton,Narges Armanfard*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: TabPFN-MT 是一种扩展的多任务上下文学习模型，能在单次前向传播中同时预测多个目标变量，在中小规模表格数据集上达到SOTA，并将推理成本从O(T)降至O(1)。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有PFN仅支持单任务推理，预测多个目标需重复前向调用，无法实现任务间信息共享，计算效率低下。

Method: 采用扩展的多目标合成先验进行训练，设计扩展的y编码器和共享解码器头，支持多任务上下文学习与同步推理，依赖上下文学习而非传统梯度训练。

Result: 在344个数据集上，TabPFN-MT在多任务表格学习中达到新SOTA；多任务数据集上Accuracy排名4.89，为所有模型中最高平均排名；推理成本从O(T)降至O(1)。

Conclusion: TabPFN-MT在中小规模多目标表格应用中实现了性能与效率的双重突破，为多任务上下文学习提供了高效新范式。

Abstract: Prior-Data Fitted networks (PFNs) have been very successful in tabular contexts, handling prediction tasks in context. However, they are designed for single-task inference, meaning that predicting several target values within a context requires repeated forward calls and precludes inter-task information sharing. We propose TabPFN-MT, which is trained on an expanded multi-target synthetic prior to capture inter-task dependencies in context. This model uses an expanded $y$-encoder and a shared decoder head to enable multitask in-context learning and simultaneous inference. The model is uniquely specialized for small-to-medium datasets by relying on in-context learning rather than traditional gradient-based training. Within this regime (averaging fewer than 1,000 samples), extensive evaluations across 344 datasets demonstrate that TabPFN-MT establishes a new state-of-the-art for deep tabular multitask learning. Furthermore, despite the inherent compute asymmetry of joint optimization, our model remains highly competitive with the latest state-of-the-art single-task ensembles. Notably, on multitask datasets it achieves an overall Accuracy rank of 4.89, the highest average rank among all models tested. Crucially, TabPFN-MT delivers this highly competitive performance while reducing the inference cost for $T$ tasks from $O(T)$ to $O(1)$ forward passes, offering a massive computational efficiency improvement for multi-target tabular applications.

</details>


### [264] [Provably Learning Diffusion Models under the Manifold Hypothesis: Collapse and Refine](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20235)
*Wei Huang,Andi Han,Mingyuan Bai,Huanjian Zhou,Qixin Zhang,Taiji Suzuki,Kenji Fukumizu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现扩散模型在低维流形数据上的训练通过“坍塌-精炼”机制（先降维到流形再学习密度）绕过维度灾难，并据此提出Score-induced Latent Diffusion（SiLD）框架，无需VAE即可同时学习流形和密度，理论保证样本复杂度取决于内在维度而非环境维度，实验验证其生成质量与重建性能优于VAE-based LDM。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散模型在低维流形数据上高效学习的原因尚未被理论解释——即为什么训练过程能绕过维度灾难（curse of dimensionality）。

Method: 1. 识别出由得分函数几何性质驱动的坍塌-精炼机制（collapse-and-refine）：小噪声尺度下得分散发奇异导致去噪映射快速坍塌到数据流形投影，中等噪声尺度下训练精炼流形上的内在密度。2. 基于此提出SiLD（Score-induced Latent Diffusion），一个两阶段框架，通过单一的得分匹配目标同时完成流形学习和密度估计，替代VAE-based潜扩散模型的KL正则化。

Result: 理论证明了样本复杂度取决于内在维度而非环境维度。实验在Stacked MNIST、CelebA变体及分子生成基准上，SiLD在生成质量上匹配或超越VAE-based LDM，并持续改进重建性能，验证了理论预测。

Conclusion: 本文从理论上揭示了扩散模型在低维流形上高效学习的机制，并提供了一个无需VAE的替代框架，兼具理论保证和实践优势。

Abstract: Diffusion models generate high-dimensional data with remarkable quality, yet how their training efficiently learns the score function, bypassing the curse of dimensionality when data is supported on low-dimensional manifolds, remains theoretically unexplained. We identify a collapse-and-refine mechanism driven by the geometry of the score function itself: at small noise scales, the diverging singularity of the score drives a rapid dimensional collapse of the induced denoising map onto the data manifold projection; at moderate noise scales, training refines the intrinsic density on the learned manifold. We instantiate this principle as Score-induced Latent Diffusion (SiLD), a two-stage framework in which both manifold learning and density estimation emerge from a single denoising score matching objective, replacing the heuristic KL regularization of VAE-based latent diffusion models. We prove that the resulting sample complexity depends on the intrinsic dimension rather than the ambient dimension. Experiments on Stacked MNIST, CelebA variants, and molecular generation benchmarks show that SiLD matches or outperforms VAE-based LDMs in generation quality and consistently improves reconstruction, validating our theoretical predictions.

</details>


### [265] [MagBridge-Battery: A Synthetic Bridge Dataset for Li-ion Magnetometry and State-of-Health Diagnostics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20240)
*Sakthi Prabhu Gunasekar,Prasanna Kumar Rangarajan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发布MagBridge-Battery v1.0合成数据集，将磁信号与电池健康状态标签桥接，提供6,760个磁场特征样本及基准测试任务，为磁感应电池诊断提供公开基准。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有电池健康诊断依赖电化学信号，磁感测虽能弥补其不足，但缺乏公开的电池磁测量数据集与退化标签配对，阻碍方法发展。

Method: 合成6,760个磁场特征样本，桥接OSF的真实磁形态数据与PulseBat的SOH标签；包含5,600个PulseBat条件样本、600个传感器异常样本、560个低电压外推样本；设计无泄漏的基准划分，定义四项基准任务。

Result: SOH回归任务R²约0.77，标签洗牌消融后降至约0，证实数据集有效编码SOH信息而非产生伪影。

Conclusion: 该数据集为磁感应电池诊断提供首个公开基准，弥补真实磁-电配对数据稀缺的缺口。

Abstract: Battery health diagnostics today rely overwhelmingly on electrochemical signals measured at the cell terminals. A parallel literature has shown that magnetic sensing can resolve information that terminal-only measurements miss, but method development is limited by the absence, to the best of our knowledge, of public battery magnetic-measurement datasets paired with degradation labels. We release MagBridge-Battery v1.0, a synthetic dataset of 6,760 magnetic-field signatures that bridges real magnetic morphology from the Mohammadi-Jerschow Open Science Framework (OSF) archive with state-of-health (SOH) labels from the PulseBat dataset. The release contains 5,600 PulseBat-conditioned grounded samples, 600 synthetic sensor-anomaly samples derived from clean parents, and 560 low-voltage Regime-B extrapolation samples. A cell-disjoint, parent-child-leakage-free primary benchmark split is verified to contain zero overlapping cells, zero cross-split parent-child pairs, and zero sample-ID overlap. We define three primary benchmark tasks: SOH regression, second-life classification, and anomaly detection, plus an auxiliary anomaly-subtype classification task. A controlled label-shuffle ablation collapses SOH regression from R^2 approximately 0.77 to approximately 0, confirming that the bridge encodes input SOH non-trivially rather than producing label-aligned artifacts. The dataset is released on Zenodo under CC-BY-4.0, and the bridge code and benchmark suite are released under Apache-2.0. This work provides a public benchmark for magnetic-sensing battery diagnostics while paired magnetic-electrochemical measurements remain scarce.

</details>


### [266] [Closed-form predictive coding via hierarchical Gaussian filters](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20293)
*Aleksandrs Baskakovs,Sylvain Estebe,Kenneth Enevoldsen,Kristoffer Nielbo,Chris Mathys,Nicolas Legrand*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文指出当前预测编码网络因固定精度矩阵为单位矩阵而丢失了精度加权预测误差，导致训练速度慢且深层网络性能下降。作者通过将预测编码网络表达为深度分层高斯滤波器，恢复精度加权消息传递，在无需全局误差信号和迭代推理的条件下实现快速、局部、贝叶斯的学习，并在多个任务上接近或超越反向传播。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前预测编码网络虽然具有生物合理性和局部学习优势，但训练速度慢、深层网络性能严重退化。作者追溯这两个问题到同一简化：固定精度矩阵为单位矩阵，丢弃了变分推导所需的精度加权预测误差。

Method: 将预测编码网络表达为深度分层高斯滤波器，恢复精度加权消息传递，得到动态不确定性估计和每一层的Hebbian兼容更新规则。在单一自由能目标下同时学习激活、权重和精度，无需全局误差信号，也无需迭代或自动微分即可完成推理。

Result: 在FashionMNIST上，该方法在epoch级时间成本上接近反向传播，且收敛所需epoch更少；在在线学习、数据效率和概念漂移任务上优于反向传播。

Conclusion: 闭合形式的变分推理结合在线精度学习为深度预测编码网络提供了可行的基础，保留了生物可解释性优势，无需迭代松弛或全局误差信号。

Abstract: Predictive coding (PC) offers a local and biologically grounded alternative to backpropagation in the training of artificial neural networks, yet to date, it remains slower, and performance degrades sharply as network depth increases. We trace both problems to a single simplification: current PC networks fix the precision matrix to the identity, discarding precision-weighted prediction errors that the variational derivation requires to be fast, local, and Bayesian. We close this gap by expressing predictive coding networks as deep hierarchical Gaussian filters (HGFs) and restore precision-weighted message passing, yielding dynamic uncertainty estimates and Hebbian-compatible update rules at every layer. The resulting networks can simultaneously learn activations, weights, and precisions under a single free-energy objective, with no global error signal, and resolve inference without requiring iterations or automatic differentiation. On FashionMNIST, our solution approaches backpropagation in epoch-level wall-clock cost while converging in fewer epochs, and outperforms it on online, data efficiency, and concept-drift tasks. We thus establish that closed-form variational inference with online precision learning provides a tractable foundation for deep predictive coding networks, retaining biological and interpretative advantages, without requiring iterative relaxation or global error signals.

</details>


### [267] [Geometry-Lite: Interpretable Safety Probing via Layer-Wise Margin Geometry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20241)
*Woo Seob Sim,Yu Rang Park*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Geometry-Lite，一种轻量级提示级安全探针，通过分析各层最终提示token表征的有符号边界来分解大语言模型的安全证据几何结构。研究发现安全证据主要表现为持久性的边界位置几何（最终/极值边界和不安全侧层占用），而非层间运动信号，且在基准迁移下类条件均值几何比优化线性边界更鲁棒。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有提示级安全探针虽能区分安全与不安全提示，但其隐藏状态表征的几何结构尚未被充分理解，特别是安全证据如何跨层形成、支持低假阳性决策的层间几何因素是什么，以及在基准迁移下哪些几何偏差保持稳定。

Method: 提出Geometry-Lite探针，将每层最终提示token表征映射为质心、局部邻域和监督线性边界三种读出方式下的有符号边界，并汇总边界位置、层间变化和粗略形状三类边界轮廓特征。

Result: 在9个指令微调模型（1.2B-70B）和7个安全基准上，Geometry-Lite优于单层探针，接近原始多层堆叠性能。分解显示最终/极值边界和不安全侧层占用主导检测性能，层间漂移贡献有限；基准迁移下类条件均值几何更鲁棒。

Conclusion: 提示级安全证据本质上是持久性的层间边界几何，而非层间运动信号；其有用组件和读出级偏差在决策关键区域才变得明显。

Abstract: Prompt-level safety probes for large language models use hidden-state representations to separate safe from unsafe prompts, but strong average detection performance does not explain the geometry of this separation. In particular, it remains unclear how safety evidence is formed across layers, which aspects of that layer-wise geometry support low-false-positive decisions, and which geometric biases remain stable under benchmark shift. We study this as an empirical decomposition problem and introduce Geometry-Lite, a compact prompt-level probe that maps each layer's final prompt-token representation to signed margins under centroid, local-neighborhood, and supervised linear-boundary readouts, then summarizes the resulting margin profiles by boundary position, layer-to-layer change, and coarse shape. Across nine instruction-tuned backbones ($1.2$B--$70$B) and seven safety benchmarks, Geometry-Lite improves over single-layer probes while remaining close to raw multi-layer score stacking, making it a useful instrument for analyzing the multi-layer safety signal. The decomposition shows that safety evidence is expressed primarily through persistent boundary-position geometry: final or extremal margins and unsafe-side layer occupancy dominate aggregate detection performance. In contrast, finite-difference drift and structural summaries add little to pooled AUROC, although drift can provide small recall-oriented corrections under shifted low-FPR thresholds. Under benchmark shift, optimized linear boundaries are sharp on the training mixture, whereas class-conditional mean geometry retains separation more reliably on a predefined hard held-out subset. Overall, prompt-level safety evidence is not primarily a layer-to-layer motion signal, but a persistent layer-wise margin geometry whose useful components and readout-level biases become visible in decision-critical regimes.

</details>


### [268] [Weight Decay Regimes in Grokking Transformers: Cheap Online Diagnostics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20441)
*Lucky Verma*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了Transformer在模算术任务中的训练动态，发现权重衰减是控制记忆化、泛化和崩溃之间相变的关键参数，并提出了两种低成本在线诊断方法（平均注意力头余弦相似度和熵标准差）。通过大量实验验证了权重衰减边界的可预测性，并排除了几种替代解释。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解Transformer在模算术任务中从记忆化到泛化再到崩溃的相变机制，寻找一个标量控制参数来调控这些状态，并开发低成本诊断工具来实时监测训练动态。

Method: 1) 使用权重衰减作为标量经验控制参数；2) 提出两种在线诊断指标：平均注意力头余弦相似度和熵标准差；3) 在11种实验条件、3种模型规模（0.82M-85M参数）下进行实验；4) 使用逻辑回归拟合相变边界，幂律拟合经验指数；5) 进行多任务复制实验、注意力头重新初始化实验、以及跨架构（MLP、LSTM、Mamba）验证实验。

Result: 1) 权重衰减轴清晰分离了记忆化、发展性grokking和崩溃三个区域；2) 相变边界在λ_c=0.0158（95% CI [0.0109, 0.0200]），经验指数ν=0.757（CI [0.725, 0.799]），排除了ν=1/2和3D Ising ν≈0.63；3) 多任务复制实验（n=280）保留了权重衰减控制模式；4) 注意力头重新初始化实验显著改变Phase-2幅度（Cohen's d=-1.190），而权重范数裁剪无此效果；5) 三种跨架构探针复现了权重衰减控制的相变，但λ_c值因架构而异。

Conclusion: 权重衰减是小型Transformer注意力模型在模算术任务中训练动态的有效标量控制参数；提出的两种在线诊断方法以较低计算成本有效追踪训练动态；但结论范围限定在模算术任务和小型Transformer注意力模型，不适用于更广泛的架构、语言模型和普适类识别。

Abstract: Transformers trained on modular arithmetic exhibit sharp transitions between memorization, generalization, and collapse. We show that weight decay acts as a scalar empirical control parameter for these regimes, and introduce two cheap online diagnostics, mean pairwise attention-head cosine similarity and entropy standard deviation, that track training dynamics from attention activations alone and complement loss-landscape diagnostics at lower compute cost. Across eleven experimental conditions and three model scales (0.82M to 85M parameters), the weight-decay axis separates memorization, developmental grokking, and collapse. A near-transition logistic fit localizes the memorization-to-developmental boundary at $λ_c=0.0158$ (95% CI [0.0109, 0.0200], N=210); a power-law fit gives an empirical exponent $ν=0.757$ (CI [0.725, 0.799]). Reference exponents $ν=1/2$ and 3D Ising $ν\approx 0.63$ lie outside this empirical CI under our four-bin grid, so we report $ν$ as empirical and defer universality-class identification to denser finite-size-scaling work. A horizon-matched multi-task replication (n=280, four modular operations) preserves the weight-decay control pattern; a paired attention-head re-initialization experiment at $λ=0.05$ changes Phase-2 amplitude (Cohen's $d=-1.190$, n=10, $p_t=4.5 \times 10^{-3}$), while matched weight-norm clipping does not. Three cross-architecture probes (4L MLP, 4L LSTM, and 4L Mamba; each n=70) replicate the weight-decay-controlled transition with architecture-specific $λ_c$ values. Main diagnostic claims are scoped to modular arithmetic in small transformer attention models; the non-attention experiments are scope probes, and architecture-wide, language-model, and universality-class claims are out of scope.

</details>


### [269] [LEAP: A closed-loop framework for perovskite precursor additive discovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20242)
*Xin-De Wang,Zhi-Rui Chen,Ze-Feng Gao,Peng-Jie Guo,Cheng Mu,Zhong-Yi Lu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出LEAP框架，结合领域专用大语言模型与贝叶斯优化，用于钙钛矿太阳能电池添加剂的高效发现。通过文献驱动的机理描述符和主动学习迭代筛选，实验验证了该方法的有效性，最佳器件PCE达21.32%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 钙钛矿太阳能电池前驱体添加剂的传统试错筛选效率低下，化学空间庞大，亟需智能化的加速发现方法。

Method: 构建领域专用LLM从文献中提取机理知识并生成可解释描述符，集成贝叶斯优化进行不确定性感知的优先级排序，结合专家反馈形成闭环主动学习框架。

Result: 领域专用模型在机理一致性推理上优于通用模型；三轮实验验证中，6-CDQ和2-CNA处理组平均PCE分别达20.13%和20.87%，优于对照组19.25%，最高PCE达21.32%。

Conclusion: 文献驱动的机理描述符结合贝叶斯优化与专家可行性审查，能够支持钙钛矿光伏中机理感知的添加剂优先级排序。

Abstract: Efficient discovery of precursor additives is essential for improving the performance of perovskite solar cells, yet the large chemical space makes conventional trial-and-error screening inefficient. We develop LEAP(LLM-driven Exploration via Active Learning for Perovskites), an expert-in-the-loop closed framework that couples a domain-specialized large language model(LLM) with active learning for iterative additive prioritization. The LLM is trained to extract mechanism-relevant knowledge from the perovskite additive literature and to represent candidate molecules through interpretable descriptors, which are further integrated into a Bayesian optimization workflow for uncertainty-aware prioritization under low-data conditions. Benchmark results on unseen literature show that the domain-specialized model outperforms general-purpose models in mechanism-consistent reasoning. Experimental validation in an expert-in-the-loop proof-of-concept study suggests improved additive prioritization across three screening rounds, leading to average device PCEs of 20.13% and 20.87% for the later-round 6-CDQ- and 2-CNA-treated devices, respectively, compared with 19.25% for the control, with a champion PCE of 21.32%. These results provide preliminary evidence that literature-grounded mechanistic descriptors, when coupled with Bayesian optimization and expert feasibility review, can support mechanism-aware additive prioritization in perovskite photovoltaics.

</details>


### [270] [GROW: Aligning GRPO with State-Action Modeling for Open-World VLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20246)
*Xiongbin Wu,Zhihao Luo,Shanzhe Lei,Lechao Zhang,Xuhong Wang,Jie Yang,Zhonglong Zheng,Yuanjie Zheng,Xin Tan,Wei Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出GROW框架，将GRPO从完整轨迹分解为状态-动作样本进行多轮强化学习，在Minecraft任务中达到SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLM智能体依赖SFT专家演示，而GRPO因需要完整轨迹作为训练样本导致上下文过长和噪声，无法有效用于多轮强化学习。

Method: 将收集的轨迹分解为状态-动作样本，在样本间计算优势而非将完整轨迹视为整体；提供替代分析表明该目标在简化假设下能保留GRPO的核心相对策略优化信号。

Result: 在800多个Minecraft任务中达到SOTA性能。

Conclusion: 提出的GROW框架有效解决了GRPO在多轮VLM智能体强化学习中的应用难题，验证了分解轨迹样本进行相对策略优化的可行性。

Abstract: Recently, vision-language model (VLM) agents have shown promising progress in open-world tasks, where successful task completion often requires multiple turns of visual perception and action execution. However, existing methods still rely primarily on Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) with expert demonstrations, while the advanced reinforcement learning (RL) algorithm, specifically Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), has not been effectively employed for multi-turn RL in these tasks because standard GRPO requires full trajectories as training samples which leads to excessively long context and noise. To address this issue, we propose GROW, a RL framework for open-world VLM agents that decomposes collected trajectories into state-action samples, and computes advantages between these samples rather than treating a full trajectory as a single entity. We further provide a surrogate analysis indicating that, even though the grouped samples are conditioned on different local states rather than an identical prompt context, the objective can preserve the core relative policy optimization signal of GRPO under simplifying assumptions. Experiments on more than 800 Minecraft tasks show that our method achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance, demonstrating the effectiveness of our proposed RL framework for open-world VLM agents.

</details>


### [271] [CP-MoE: Consistency-Preserving Mixture-of-Experts for Continual Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20247)
*Yang Liu,Toan Nguyen,Flora D. Salim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CP-MoE提出一种基于瞬态专家（transient expert）的持续学习框架，通过一致性保持路由偏置和瞬态专家引导的正则化机制，在MoE架构中平衡任务间知识迁移与灾难性遗忘，在自然语言和多模态基准上达到SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于LoRA的MoE持续学习方法存在根本性权衡：要么过度隔离专家限制知识迁移，要么任务特定更新覆盖重要参数导致严重遗忘。需要一种既能保护历史参数又能促进跨任务知识迁移的机制。

Method: 1) 瞬态专家（Transient Expert）：捕获早期任务特定更新，引导其融入稳定专家；2) 一致性保持路由偏置：利用瞬态专家估计与稳定专家的表示相似性，引导路由选择更兼容的专家；3) 瞬态专家引导的正则化机制：在合并过程中选择性保护重要历史参数。

Result: 在SuperNI基准上达到SOTA性能，对未见任务具有更强的零样本迁移能力；在VQA v2上有效扩展至多模态视觉推理，持续减少遗忘，优于强MoE基线。

Conclusion: CP-MoE通过瞬态专家机制有效缓解了MoE持续学习中知识迁移与灾难性遗忘的权衡，在单模态和多模态场景下均验证了有效性。

Abstract: Catastrophic forgetting remains a major obstacle to continual learning in large language models (LLMs) and vision--language models (VLMs). Although Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures offer an efficient path to scaling, existing LoRA-based MoE continual learning methods still face a fundamental trade-off: they either isolate experts too aggressively, limiting knowledge transfer across tasks, or allow task-specific updates to overwrite important existing parameters, leading to severe forgetting. To address this, we propose CP-MoE, a continual learning framework built around a transient expert that captures early task-specific updates and guides their integration into stable experts. CP-MoE introduces a consistency-preserving routing bias, which uses the transient expert to estimate representation similarity with stable experts and steer routing towards more compatible expert selection, and a transient expert-guided regularisation mechanism, which selectively protects important historical parameters during merging. Together, these components reduce parameter interference and forgetting while preserving cross-task knowledge transfer. We validate CP-MoE on both unimodal and multimodal continual learning benchmarks with LLM-based and VLM-based MoE models. On SuperNI benchmark, spanning diverse sequential language tasks, CP-MoE achieves state-of-the-art performance and stronger zero-shot transfer to unseen tasks. On VQA v2 dataset, it scales effectively to multimodal visual reasoning, consistently reduces forgetting, and outperforms strong MoE baselines.

</details>


### [272] [Graph Transductive Sharpening: Leveraging Unlabeled Predictions in Node Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20248)
*Brown Zaz,Mar Gonzàlez I Català,Ferran Hernandez Caralt,Moshe Eliasof,Pietro Liò*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为Transductive Sharpening（TS）的损失函数修改方法，通过对无标签节点最小化预测熵，同时在标签节点平衡该效应，在不改变模型架构的情况下提升半监督节点分类性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有半监督节点分类主要关注架构创新，而忽略了训练目标本身。标准监督损失丢弃了无标签节点的预测信号，但这些信号可能包含有用信息。

Method: 基于交叉熵可分解为标签相关的对齐项和标签无关的熵项这一观察，提出Transductive Sharpening（TS）：在损失层面，对无标签节点最小化预测熵（使其更自信），同时对有标签节点进行平衡，防止过拟合。

Result: 在多个节点分类基准数据集上，TS在不改变任何骨干架构的情况下，一致地提升了分类性能。

Conclusion: 训练目标本身是一个正交且有效的优化方向，通过简单修改损失函数即可利用无标签节点的预测信号，实现性能提升。

Abstract: In the transductive setting, where the full graph is observed but node labels are only partially available, progress in semi-supervised node classification has largely focused on architectural innovation. In this paper, we revisit an orthogonal axis: the training objective. We start from a simple observation: transductive models produce predictions for every node during training, including nodes without labels. These unlabeled-node predictions may contain useful training signal, but standard supervised objectives discard them because no ground-truth labels are available. Inspired by the decomposition of cross-entropy into a label-dependent alignment term and a label-independent entropy term, we propose prediction confidence as a natural way to extract this signal in the absence of labels. This motivates Transductive Sharpening (TS): a loss-level modification that minimizes prediction entropy on unlabeled nodes while counterbalancing this effect on labeled nodes. We evaluate Transductive Sharpening across a wide range of node-classification benchmarks and observe consistent performance improvements without requiring any changes to the backbone architecture. Code is available at https://github.com/transductive-sharpening/tunedGNN.

</details>


### [273] [Automated Kernel Discovery Towards Understanding High-dimensional Bayesian Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20249)
*Taeyoung Yun,Woocheol Shin,Inhyuck Song,Jaewoo Lee,Jinkyoo Park*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Kernel Discovery，一种由LLM驱动的演化框架，用于高维贝叶斯优化中的核函数自动发现。该方法采用两阶段LLM策略（先提出数学形式，再生成可执行代码），并引入LOO-CRPS选择准则以防止过拟合。在五个高维BO基准上，该方法平均排名1.2/17，显著优于基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高维贝叶斯优化（BO）中，高斯过程核函数的设计严重依赖人工经验；现有自动化方法在高维场景下存在两个瓶颈：一是核搜索空间局限于基础核的加法和乘法组合，二是基于LLM的方法需要依赖原始观测数据，受限于上下文长度且难以提取有效模式。

Method: 提出Kernel Discovery框架：（1）两阶段LLM策略——第一阶段让LLM提出新颖的数学表达式，第二阶段将表达式转换为可验证的可执行代码；（2）引入留一法连续分级概率评分（LOO-CRPS）作为选择准则，有效惩罚过拟合的核函数。

Result: 在五个高维BO基准测试中，该方法在17种方法中平均排名1.2，显著优于所有竞争基线。

Conclusion: 本文证明通过LLM驱动的演化搜索，可以在超越传统组合规则的大核空间中自动发现有效的高维BO核函数，同时避免对原始观测数据的依赖。进一步分析揭示了哪些核函数有助于提升高维BO性能。

Abstract: Gaussian Process (GP) kernels are central to Bayesian optimization (BO), yet designing effective kernels for high-dimensional problems still relies on extensive manual engineering. Existing automated approaches struggle in high dimensions for two bottlenecks: their kernel search space is limited to additions and multiplications of base kernels, and LLM-based approaches require conditioning on raw observations, which becomes infeasible due to context-length limits and the difficulty of extracting meaningful patterns. We introduce \textbf{Kernel Discovery}, a LLM-driven evolutionary framework for high-dimensional BO that searches a broader kernel space beyond predefined composition rules and does not require conditioning on observations. Motivated by the observation that directly prompting an LLM to generate kernel code yields syntactically varied but functionally identical kernels, we adopt a two-stage approach: an LLM first proposes novel mathematical forms, then a second LLM call converts each form into validated, executable code. We also propose a leave-one-out continuous ranked probability score (LOO-CRPS) as a selection criterion that penalizes overfitted kernels. On five high-dimensional BO benchmarks, our method achieves an average rank of \textbf{1.2 out of 17}, outperforming competitive baselines.
  We further analyze the discovered kernels to identify which kernels lead to improvements in high-dimensional BO.

</details>


### [274] [Physics-informed convolutional neural networks for fluid flow through porous media](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20250)
*Rafał Topolnicki,Paweł Dłotko,Maciej Matyka*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于卷积编码器-解码器架构的神经网络框架，直接从多孔介质几何结构预测孔隙尺度速度场，并通过自定义损失函数确保物理一致性。该模型可泛化到分布外样本，预测的速度场作为格子玻尔兹曼模拟的初始条件，在超过90%的测试案例中加速了求解器收敛。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多孔介质中的流体流动模拟因孔隙几何复杂且求解Navier-Stokes方程计算成本高而面临挑战，尤其是需要重复模拟时，传统数值求解器在复杂多孔域中收敛缓慢。

Method: 采用带跳跃连接的卷积编码器-解码器架构（类似U-Net），提取多尺度特征的同时保留空间细节。自定义损失函数包含速度重建误差、不可压缩性约束、固体内部无流条件、周期性约束以及全局曲折度一致性，并对不同损失权重进行了分析。评估了多种CNN主干网络，并在分布外样本（含几何变化、边界条件、孔隙率变化及真实多孔结构）上进行泛化测试。

Result: 模型能够准确预测速度场，具有较强的泛化能力。将预测速度场作为Lattice-Boltzmann模拟的初始条件（热启动策略），在超过90%的测试案例中减少了迭代次数，加速了求解器收敛。

Conclusion: 该神经网络框架可有效替代传统数值求解器进行快速速度场预测，其热启动策略能显著提升后续模拟的计算效率，具有实用价值。

Abstract: Accurate simulation of fluid flow in porous media is challenging due to complex pore-space geometries and the computational cost of solving the Navier-Stokes equations. This difficulty is particularly important when repeated simulations are required, as standard numerical solvers may converge slowly in intricate porous domains. We present a neural-network-based framework for predicting pore-scale velocity fields directly from sample geometry. The method uses a convolutional encoder-decoder architecture with skip connections to preserve spatial detail while extracting multi-scale features. Physical consistency is encouraged through a custom loss function combining velocity reconstruction with incompressibility, no-flow conditions inside solids, periodicity constraints, and agreement with the global tortuosity index. We analyze the influence of the corresponding loss weights and quantify the contribution of individual loss components to prediction accuracy. Several CNN backbones are evaluated to identify architectures providing accurate and robust predictions. The generalization ability of the trained model is tested on samples outside the training distribution, including changes in obstacle geometry, boundary conditions, porosity, and realistic porous structures. Finally, we demonstrate a practical use of the predicted velocity fields as initial conditions for Lattice-Boltzmann simulations. This warm-start strategy accelerates solver convergence, reducing the number of iterations in over 90% of tested cases.

</details>


### [275] [Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning for Safe Autonomous Driving Under Pedestrian Behavioral Uncertainty](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20255)
*Prakash Aryan,Kaushik Raghupathruni,Timo Kehrer,Sebastiano Panichella*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出基于多智能体强化学习（MARL）的联合训练框架，让12个行人与自动驾驶汽车（SDC）共同训练，以模拟真实行人过街行为（含乱穿马路和隐藏人格特征）。相比固定策略基线，联合训练的SDC目标达成率78%（碰撞率14%），优于基线的35%（33%）。乱穿马路仅占13%的过街事件，却导致62%的碰撞。MARL联合训练相比单智能体RL降低30%碰撞率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自动驾驶仿真测试使用脚本化或简化的行人模型，无法捕捉真实行人过街行为的异质性和不确定性，尤其是乱穿马路行为受车辆无法观测的潜在人格特征影响，导致安全评估缺乏真实性。

Method: 构建MARL环境，采用MAPPO算法联合训练1辆SDC和12个行人。行人底层移动使用Dijkstra路径规划，高层决策（走/停）由RL策略控制。乱穿马路概率由每个行人随机采样的人格特征决定，对SDC隐藏。通过速度差指标衡量SDC对乱穿行人的预期程度。

Result: 联合训练SDC在500次评估中达到78%目标达成率、14%碰撞率；最佳规则基线为35%和33%。SDC在距乱穿行人0-3米范围内速度比靠近正常行人快2.65 m/s，表明未预期乱穿行为。乱穿仅占13%事件但导致62%碰撞。MARL相比单智能体RL降低30%碰撞率。

Conclusion: MARL联合训练可以生成比固定策略基线更真实的交互场景，行人能学会在SDC高速接近时等待，从而减少碰撞。乱穿行人造成的碰撞风险极高，且SDC难以提前预测，说明需要更有效的行人意图感知机制。

Abstract: Simulation-based testing of self-driving cars (SDCs) typically relies on scripted or simplified pedestrian models that do not capture the heterogeneity and uncertainty of real human crossing behavior. This limits the realism of safety assessments, especially in scenarios involving jaywalking, which is governed by latent personality traits that the vehicle cannot observe. We hypothesize that jointly training pedestrians and the SDC with multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) produces more realistic interaction scenarios than training the SDC against fixed pedestrian policies, and that the resulting behavior gap between predictable and unpredictable crossings can be measured directly from trajectories. This paper describes a MARL environment in which an SDC and 12 pedestrians are co-trained using Multi-Agent Proximal Policy Optimization (MAPPO). Pedestrian locomotion follows scripted Dijkstra pathfinding, while an RL policy controls high-level go/wait decisions. Jaywalking probability depends on a per-pedestrian personality trait sampled at episode start and hidden from the SDC. In 500-episode evaluations, the co-trained SDC reached 78% of goals with a 14% collision rate, compared to 35% goals and 33% collisions for the best rule-based baseline. A speed differential metric shows that the SDC traveled 2.65 m/s faster near jaywalkers than near crosswalk users at close range (0-3 m), indicating that jaywalking encounters were not anticipated. Jaywalking accounted for 13% of crossing events but was associated with 62% of collisions. Co-training with MARL pedestrians reduced collisions by 30% relative to single-agent RL, as pedestrians learned to wait when the SDC approached at speed.

</details>


### [276] [FBOS-RL: Feedback-Driven Bi-Objective Synergistic Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20256)
*Xikai Zhang,Yongzhi Li,Likang Xiao,Yingze Zhang,Yanhua Cheng,Quan Chen,Peng Jiang,Wenjun Wu,Liu Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 针对GRPO在模型能力不足时采样质量差导致训练停滞的问题，提出FBOS-RL框架，通过反馈引导探索增强和双目标协同训练（利用对齐EPA与探索培养ECC），两者相互促进形成正向飞轮，显著提升训练效率和最终性能上限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: GRPO等强化学习方法在模型当前能力不足以完成任务时，简单从同一原始提示采样，难以产生高质量轨迹，导致策略模型缺乏有意义的梯度方向，训练陷入停滞。

Method: 提出FBOS-RL框架：(1) 基于环境反馈进行反馈引导的探索增强；(2) 设计两个相互增强的训练目标——利用导向策略对齐(EPA)和探索导向能力培养(ECC)，形成正向飞轮效应。

Result: 在相同采样次数下，FBOS-RL比GRPO和基于反馈的基线学习更快、性能天花板更高，且训练过程中策略熵更高、梯度范数更低。

Conclusion: EPA和ECC两个目标能够相互增强，形成正向飞轮效应，显著提升强化学习的训练效率和最终性能上限。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning has become a cornerstone for aligning and unlocking the reasoning capabilities of large-scale models. At its core, the training loop of GRPO and its variants alternates between rollout sampling and policy update. Unlike supervised learning, where each gradient step is anchored to an explicit ground-truth target, the optimal gradient direction for updating model parameters in this setting is not known a priori; the high-quality rollouts drawn during the sampling stage therefore act as the implicit "teacher" that guides every parameter update. However, GRPO adopt a simple sampling scheme that conditions all rollouts on the same original prompt. When a task lies beyond the policy model's current capability, this sampling scheme rarely yields a high-quality rollout, leaving the policy model without a meaningful gradient direction when updating its parameters, which causes training to stall. To address this issue, we propose FBOS-RL, a Feedback-Driven Bi-Objective Synergistic reinforcement learning framework. Specifically, we let the model perform Feedback-Guided Exploration Enhancement based on the feedback provided by the environment, and on top of this we design two mutually reinforcing training objectives: Exploitation-oriented Policy Alignment(EPA) and Exploration-oriented Capability Cultivation(ECC). Extensive experiments demonstrate that EPA and ECC can mutually reinforce each other, forming a positive flywheel effect that significantly improves both the training efficiency and the final performance ceiling of reinforcement learning. Specifically, under an identical number of rollouts, FBOS-RL learns substantially faster than GRPO and feedback-based baselines and ultimately attains a higher performance ceiling, while exhibiting higher policy entropy and lower gradient norms throughout training.

</details>


### [277] [Instance Discrimination for Link Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20257)
*Valentin Cuzin-Rambaud,Mathieu Lefort,Rémy Cazabet*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对自监督学习中的链接预测任务，提出基于链接表示的新模型L-GRACE和L-BGRL，并引入基于社区结构的图增强方法，在无属性图上表现优异，达到与监督方法相当的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自监督学习方法在图节点分类上表现良好，但在链接预测任务上的研究较少，且缺乏系统评估。作者希望填补这一空白，提升自监督方法在链接预测上的表现。

Method: 1)系统评估现有自监督模型在链接预测任务中的表现；2)提出基于社区结构的图增强方法；3)提出两个基于链接表示（而非节点表示）的新模型L-GRACE和L-BGRL。

Result: 新模型在链接预测上优于现有方法，尤其在无属性图上表现突出，在监督和自监督场景下均达到与最先进方法相当的性能。

Conclusion: 基于链接表示的方法比传统的节点表示方法更适合链接预测任务，社区结构增强是一种有效的图增强策略。

Abstract: Recently, instance discrimination models have emerged as a major solution for self-supervised learning. Having already demonstrated its effectiveness in the image domain, instance discrimination learning is now proving equally convincing in the graph domain, in particular for node classification. However, fewer contributions have tackled the link prediction task. In this contribution, we propose to adapt existing methods to this context. We first provide a rigorous evaluation of existing self-supervised models in the field of link prediction, showing that the main performance depends on the augmentation process (like in computer vision). We then propose a new structural augmentation based on the community structure that is relevant for link prediction. Our main contribution introduces two new models, L-GRACE and L-BGRL, based on link representations instead of node representations, which improve the performance of the existing methods, especially on unattributed graphs, and we show that they perform on par with the state of the art, both in supervised and self-supervised contexts.

</details>


### [278] [It Takes Two: Complementary Self-Distillation for Contextual Integrity in LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20258)
*Sangwoo Park,Woongyeong Yeo,Seanie Lee,Yumin Choi,Hyomin Lee,Kangsan Kim,Jinheon Baek,Seong Joon Oh,Sung Ju Hwang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出SELFCI框架，通过互补式自蒸馏将信息抑制与任务解决解耦，在不牺牲任务效用的情况下实现上下文完整性隐私对齐，效果优于GRPO等基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型作为个人代理处理敏感工作流时，需要遵循上下文完整性（CI）的隐私规范，但现有模型不可靠且缓解策略会损害任务性能，存在隐私-效用权衡问题。

Method: 提出SELFCI框架，通过互补式自蒸馏联合优化两个独立的逆KL散度：一个鼓励保留任务相关信息（效用），另一个强制执行最小且适当的披露（隐私）。两者形成专家乘积（PoE）目标，对齐能力与隐私要求的交集。

Result: 无需昂贵外部监督，SELFCI在信息泄露决策上持续优于GRPO等在线强化学习基线，且在涉及代理工作流和累积私有上下文的域外场景中表现同样出色。

Conclusion: SELFCI提供了一条通往上下文完整性对齐的实用路径，有效解耦了隐私与效用之间的冲突。

Abstract: Contextual Integrity (CI) defines privacy not merely as keeping information hidden, but as governing information flows according to the norms of a given context. As large language models are increasingly deployed as personal agents handling sensitive workflows, adhering to CI becomes critical. However, even frontier models remain unreliable in making disclosure decisions, and existing mitigation strategies often degrade underlying task performance. To overcome this privacy-utility trade-off, we propose SELFCI, a complementary self-distillation framework that decouples information suppression from task resolution. SELFCI jointly optimizes two independent reverse KL divergences over distinct teacher distributions derived from feedback: one encourages preserving task-relevant information for utility, while the other enforces minimal and appropriate disclosure. This complementary formulation induces a Product-of-Experts (PoE) target, aligning the policy with the intersection of capability and privacy requirements. Empirical evaluations demonstrate that SELFCI, without relying on costly external supervision, consistently outperforms competitive baselines such as online reinforcement learning algorithms (e.g., GRPO). These trends further extend to out-of-domain settings involving agentic workflows and accumulated private context, suggesting that SELFCI provides a practical path toward CI alignment.

</details>


### [279] [Residual Paving: Diagnosing the Routing Bottleneck in Selective Refusal Editing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20262)
*Bryce Hinkley,Peyman Najafirad*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Residual Paving方法，通过解耦路由选择性（是否干预）与残差编辑能力（编辑什么），实现对冻结指令微调Transformer的选择性拒绝编辑。在Gemma-3-4B-IT上，编辑集拒绝率从88.6%降至4.0%，良性和有害行为保持率分别为95.5%和87.3%。实验表明路由选择性是主要瓶颈。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将选择性拒绝编辑建模为三向控制问题：在指定编辑提示上诱导非拒绝行为，同时保持编辑集外的良性行为和有害拒绝不变。现有方法（如ActAdd、DIM）在编辑成功率上表现较弱。

Method: Residual Paving方法：早期层路由器预测标量门控和专家混合；激活时，基于提示的条件瓶颈残差专家在后续层应用残差更新，保持主干网络不变。该分解支持oracle路由诊断，仅用真实标签替换学习的标量门控。

Result: 在Gemma-3-4B-IT上：编辑拒绝率从88.6%降至4.0%；良性分布保持95.5%；有害分布保持87.3%。对比方法编辑拒绝率分别为86.8%（ActAdd）和78.9%（DIM）。有害拒绝保持低于冻结基线（65.3% vs 81.6%）。在6个骨干上oracle路由均提升诊断得分，中位增益+12.9pp。

Conclusion: 路由选择性是当前方法的主要瓶颈；轨迹诊断表明编辑方向是朝向目标续写而非通用拒绝抑制。

Abstract: We study selective refusal editing as a three-way control problem: induce non-refusal on designated edit prompts while preserving benign behavior and harmful refusals outside the edit set. We introduce Residual Paving, a routed residual editing method for frozen instruction-tuned transformers that separates route selectivity, whether to intervene, from residual-edit capacity, what edit to apply. An early-layer router predicts a scalar gate and expert mixture; when active, prompt-conditioned bottleneck residual experts apply later-layer residual updates while leaving the backbone unchanged. This decomposition supports an oracle-routing diagnostic where only the learned scalar gate is replaced with the held-out edit/keep label, leaving the residual editor and frozen backbone fixed. On the primary Gemma-3-4B-IT held-out split, learned Residual Paving reduces edit refusal from 88.6% to 4.0%, with 95.5% benign distribution preservation and 87.3% harmful distribution preservation. Same-protocol one-direction steering controls are much weaker on edit success, leaving edit refusal at 86.8% for Edit-target ActAdd and 78.9% for DIM-style refusal steering. The remaining failure is off-target harmful-keep degradation: harmful refusal remains below the frozen-base rate, 65.3% vs. 81.6%. Across six backbones, oracle routing improves the keep-side diagnostic score on every reported row, with median gain +12.9 pp, supporting the interpretation that learned route selectivity is the main observed bottleneck. Trajectory diagnostics on two backbones further suggest directed movement toward edit-target continuations rather than generic refusal suppression.

</details>


### [280] [Chronicle: A Multimodal Foundation Model for Joint Language and Time Series Understanding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20268)
*Paul Quinlan,Jeremy Levasseur,Qingguo Li,Xiaodan Zhu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Chronicle是一个324M参数的纯解码器Transformer，从头开始联合预训练自然语言和时间序列，两种模态共享同一架构，在NLU、时间序列分类和多模态预测任务上均达到或超越领域专用模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有时间序列基础模型仅处理数值序列，而多模态文本+时间序列模型都是事后适配预训练语言模型，其表征从未见过时序数据；且这些模型只与多模态基线对比，未与单模态最强模型比较，不清楚联合训练是否必要。

Method: 设计了一个324M参数的纯解码器Transformer，文本和时间序列共享相同的transformer块、注意力机制和残差流。预训练主要使用单模态批次，跨模态能力通过共享参数自然涌现，最后通过短对齐阶段交织两种模态。

Result: 在19个NLU任务上匹配Gemma-3-270M-PT；在24个UCR/UEA数据集的时间序列分类上创下冻结嵌入的新标杆；在Time-MMD多模态预测上超越所有监督融合基线。

Conclusion: Chronicle是首个从头联合预训练文本和时间序列的模型，也是首个在两个领域与专用基础模型进行对比评估的多模态模型，证明了联合训练的必要性和有效性，单一骨干网络即可在多领域取得优异表现。

Abstract: Real-world time series come with text: metadata, descriptions, news, reports. Yet time series foundation models process numerical sequences in isolation, and the multimodal text-and-time-series models that attempt to bridge the two all adapt a pretrained language model post hoc, inheriting representations shaped without ever seeing temporal data. These models are also evaluated almost exclusively against other multimodal baselines, not against the strongest unimodal foundation models in either domain, leaving open whether joint training is needed at all. We present Chronicle, a compact 324M-parameter decoder-only transformer trained from scratch on natural language and time series within a single unified architecture. Both modalities share the same transformer blocks, attention mechanism, and residual stream; the bulk of pretraining uses unimodal batches so cross-modal capability emerges purely from shared parameters, with a short alignment stage that interleaves the two. To our knowledge, Chronicle is the first model jointly pretrained on text and time series from scratch, and the first multimodal model evaluated against dedicated foundation models in both domains. It matches Gemma-3-270M-PT on 19 NLU tasks, sets a new bar for frozen-embedding time series classification on 24 UCR/UEA datasets, and produces multimodal forecasts on Time-MMD that beat every supervised fusion baseline, all from a single backbone.

</details>


### [281] [Catching a Moving Subspace: Low-Rank Bandits Beyond Stationarity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20269)
*Hamed Khosravi,Xiaoming Huo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了分段平稳低秩线性上下文赌博机问题，证明在标量奖励下移动子空间可恢复的三个充要条件，提出SPSC算法实现$\widetilde{O}(r\sqrt{T})$的内在秩动态遗憾，并在11个基准上验证有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工作要么假设低秩结构但无法处理子空间漂移，要么能处理非平稳但支付环境维度$d$的遗憾上界。实际场景中奖励既位于低维子空间又可能发生漂移，亟需统一框架。

Method: 提出SPSC算法，在探测阶段用各向同性探测向量恢复低秩子空间，在利用阶段在$r$维子空间内运行投影岭UCB；并设计CUSUM变体在线检测分段边界。

Result: 动态遗憾为$\widetilde{O}(r\sqrt{T})+\widetilde{O}(T^{2/3})+O(W\,V_{\mathrm{in}})$，将环境维度$d$替换为内在秩$r$；在11个基准上优于对比基线。

Conclusion: 首次刻画了此类问题的识别边界并达到内在秩动态遗憾率，且三个探测条件（已知噪声方差、有界状态-噪声耦合、全维探测支撑）是充要的。

Abstract: Many bandit deployments (recommendation, clinical dosing, ad targeting) share two facts prior work handles only in isolation: rewards live on a low-dimensional latent subspace, and that subspace drifts. Stationary low-rank bandits exploit rank but break under subspace change; non-stationary linear bandits adapt to drift but pay ambient rate $\widetilde{O}(d\sqrt{T})$. We study piecewise-stationary low-rank linear contextual bandits with scalar feedback: $θ_t = B_k^\star w_t$ with rank-$r$ factor $B_k^\star\in\mathbb{R}^{d\times r}$ constant within each of $K$ unknown segments and able to shift at boundaries. Our results are tight along three axes. (i) Identification boundary. With single-play scalar rewards, the moving subspace is recoverable through quadratic functionals of rewards iff three probe-side conditions hold: known noise variance, bounded state-noise coupling, and full-dimensional probe support. Each is necessary in the unrestricted-second-moment problem, and jointly they are sufficient, characterizing the boundary of the solvable region. (ii) Algorithm and dynamic regret. SPSC interleaves isotropic probes with windowed projected ridge-UCB exploitation inside the learned $r$-dimensional subspace; a CUSUM-style variant discovers segment boundaries online. The costed dynamic regret is $\widetilde{O}(r\sqrt{T})+\widetilde{O}(T^{2/3})+O(W\,V_{\mathrm{in}})$, replacing the ambient $d\sqrt{T}$ rate with the intrinsic rank. (iii) Empirics. On eleven benchmarks spanning synthetic, UCI/MovieLens, semi-synthetic clinical, and ZOZOTOWN production-log data, SPSC outperforms non-stationary and low-rank baselines whenever $d-r\gtrsim T^{1/6}$, matching the analytical crossover. To our knowledge, this is the first work to characterize the identification boundary and attain the intrinsic-rank dynamic-regret rate in this setting.

</details>


### [282] [Conformal Selective Acting: Anytime-Valid Risk Control for RLVR-Trained LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20270)
*Hamed Khosravi,Xiaoming Huo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出CSA（Conformal Selective Acting），一种面向受监管组织中在线更新LLM部署的逐轮安全认证包装器。CSA通过维护每阈值Ville型e过程，实现了任意路径下的选择性风险控制，满足每部署误差预算α的严格安全要求，并在大量实验中证明是唯一满足路径有效性和非拒绝部署的方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 受监管组织中的本地专家LLM（经RLVR微调）逐流部署需要严格的安全认证（每轮误差预算α），但现有方法无法满足这一要求：离线共形风险方法要求可交换性，在线共形方法仅约束长期平均，非可交换扩展仅边缘有效，最接近的A-RCPS控制的是边缘风险而非选择性风险。需要一种能提供逐轮、任意路径有效、选择性风险控制的部署包装器。

Method: CSA框架：(1) 构建测试统计量、有效性保证、部署规则的三元框架，识别出"每阈值e过程+选择性风险+任意路径有效性+最大认证阈值规则"这一空白单元；(2) 在Bonferroni网格上为每个阈值维护Ville型e过程，并针对RLVR过滤进行评价；(3) 利用可预测更新和保序校准单调风险，实现选择性风险控制。

Result: 理论结果：(i) 任意路径选择性风险界 R_T^act ≤ α + O(N_T^{-1/2})，(ii) 率最优认证匹配 Θ(η̄^{-2} log(1/δ))，(iii) 与时间无关的发布率间隙。实验覆盖8个专家基准（480流）、16个对抗性分布偏移场景（160流）、5个实时Expert-Iteration RLVR实验（10300轮），CSA是10种比较方法中唯一满足路径有效性和非拒绝部署的方法。

Conclusion: CSA不是新的LLM、训练算法或策略类，而是模型无关的部署侧补充，为无法使用前沿API的运营商提供逐轮安全认证。它填补了安全LLM部署中"严格逐轮风险控制"这一空白，在理论上给出了最优的认证率，并在大量实验中验证了其唯一有效性。

Abstract: A local specialist LLM, fine-tuned with reinforcement learning from verifiable rewards (RLVR) on operator-local data, is installed in a regulated organization with per-deployment error budget $α$. The operator needs a safety certificate for this deployment's stream at every round: no pooling across deployments, no waiting for a long-run average. Existing wrappers cannot deliver this on adaptive, online-updated streams: offline conformal-risk methods require exchangeability; online-conformal methods bound only long-run averages; non-exchangeable extensions are marginally valid; and the closest anytime wrapper, A-RCPS, controls marginal rather than selective risk. Using a (test statistic, validity guarantee, deployment rule) framework, we identify one empty cell forced by deployment requirements: e-process per threshold, selective risk, anytime-pathwise validity, max-certified-threshold rule. Conformal Selective Acting (CSA) fills it as a per-round wrapper maintaining a Ville-type e-process per threshold on a Bonferroni grid, evaluated against the RLVR filtration. Under predictable updates and isotonic-calibrated monotone risk we prove (i) an anytime-pathwise selective-risk bound $R_T^{\mathrm{act}}\leα+O(N_T^{-1/2})$, (ii) rate-optimal certification matching $Θ(\barη^{-2}\log(1/δ))$, and (iii) a horizon-independent release-rate gap. Across eight specialist benchmarks ($480$ streams), sixteen adversarial distribution-shift cells ($160$ streams), and five live Expert-Iteration RLVR cells with online LoRA over four base models in three architecture families ($10{,}300$ rounds), CSA is the only method among ten compared that satisfies pathwise validity and non-refusing deployment on every cell. We do not propose a new LLM, training algorithm, or policy class; CSA is the deployment-side complement, orthogonal to the model, for operators who cannot use a frontier API.

</details>


### [283] [Smaller Abstract State Spaces Enable Cross-Scale Generalization in Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20272)
*Nasehatul Mustakim,Lucas Lehnert*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出首个理论模型，证明在部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDPs）中，通过抽象函数和后续加权模型缩减，智能体可以实现分布外（OOD）泛化，并推导了性能损失上界，表明限制抽象状态空间的大小是泛化的关键。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人类能够将抽象概念泛化到更复杂或更大的任务，但强化学习（RL）系统缺乏这种能力。现有方法无法解释如何在RL中实现分布外（OOD）泛化。

Method: 1. 将现有状态抽象框架和证明技术扩展到POMDPs；2. 定义后续加权模型缩减（successor-weighted model reduction），实现比先前定义更小的抽象空间压缩；3. 推导OOD测试性能的边界，将性能损失分解为近似误差和估计误差。

Result: 推导出OOD测试性能的边界，证明约束智能体在小的、有限的抽象状态集上操作是泛化到更复杂任务的必要条件。

Conclusion: 限制抽象状态空间的大小对实现跨复杂度任务的泛化至关重要，为设计可跨任务规模扩展的RL架构提供了理论依据。

Abstract: While humans readily generalize abstract concepts to more complex or larger tasks, building Reinforcement Learning (RL) systems with this ability remains elusive. Here, we present the first theoretical model of how such Out-of-Distribution (OOD) generalization can be achieved in RL agents. Our approach considers Partially Observable Markov Decision Processes (POMDPs) and assumes that an intelligent agent uses an abstraction function to determine which experiences can be treated as equivalent and which must be distinguished. First, we extend the existing state abstraction framework and proof techniques to POMDPs. Then, we define a successor-weighted model reduction, a model reduction variant that enables compression into smaller abstract spaces than prior definitions allow. We derive a bound on the agent's OOD test performance, thereby defining the conditions under which OOD generalization is achievable. This bound decomposes an agent's performance loss into approximation and estimation errors, revealing how reducing an agent's abstract state space size improves test performance and OOD generalization. Our analysis suggests that constraining an agent to operate over a small, finite set of abstract states is necessary for achieving generalization to more complex tasks. Our results motivate further research into learning RL architectures that scale across tasks of varying complexity levels.

</details>


### [284] [Domain-Adaptable Reinforcement Learning for Code Generation with Dense Rewards](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21180)
*Erfan Aghadavoodi Jolfaei,Daniel Maninger,Abhinav Anand,Mert Tiftikci,Mira Mezini*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一个基于强化学习（PPO）的微调框架，用于将预训练代码生成LLM与语法、功能正确性、代码风格、安全性和领域特定约束（如机器人模拟器可执行性）对齐。该方法通过可定制的执行感知奖励公式和token级奖励映射机制实现，在MBPP/MBPP+和RoboEval上分别取得了pass@1提升19%和执行失败减少51%的显著效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM在自动代码生成方面表现强劲，但缺乏对正确性、质量、安全性和领域特定约束（如机器人物理环境约束）的保障，亟需一种可适配多样化需求的对齐方法。

Method: 采用近端策略优化（PPO）对预训练LLM进行微调，设计可定制的执行感知奖励函数，涵盖语法、功能正确性、代码风格、安全性和模拟器可执行性；并提出token级奖励映射机制，将执行结果有效分配到各生成token上。

Result: 在通用代码生成任务（MBPP/MBPP+）上pass@1绝对提升19%；在机器人程序合成任务（RoboEval）上执行失败减少51%。

Conclusion: 结构化强化学习能够有效将语言模型对齐到正确程序生成和领域特定需求上。

Abstract: Large language models show strong potential for automated code generation, but lack guarantees for correctness, quality, safety, and domain-specific constraints. For instance in robotics, where code generation is increasingly being used for planning and executing actions, awareness of the environment and physical constraints is critical. To facilitate the adaption of code-generating LLMs to diverse requirements, including domain-specific ones, we present a reinforcement learning framework that fine-tunes pre-trained LLMs using proximal policy optimization. Our customizable execution-aware reward formula captures and optimizes syntax, functional correctness, code style, security, and simulator executability. A token-level reward mapping mechanism enables effective credit assignment from execution outcomes to generated tokens. The framework is evaluated on general-purpose code generation (MBPP/MBPP+) and robotic program synthesis (RoboEval). The results show substantial improvements in functional correctness and simulator executability, including an absolute pass@1 increase of 19% on MBPP and a reduction in execution failures by 51% on RoboEval. These findings demonstrate that structured reinforcement learning can effectively align language models to correct program generation and domain-specific requirements.

</details>


### [285] [Modality-Decoupled Online Recursive Editing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20273)
*Siyuan Li,Youyuan Zhang,Fangming Liu,Jing Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出M-ORE，一种模态解耦的在线递归编辑方法，用于多模态大语言模型（MLLM）的终身适应。M-ORE通过统一近端投影公式和Sherman-Morrison递归实现恒定开销的闭式更新，分别维护文本栈和视觉投影器的模块级统计量避免视觉主导更新，并在固定正交低秩编辑子空间中进行连续更新以缓解长程干扰。实验表明其在可靠性、通用性和局部性上均优于强基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文本LLM的模型编辑方法在多模态大语言模型上表现不佳，原因有二：一是视觉主导的激活会扭曲更新统计量，导致跨模态冲突；二是顺序写入在共享编辑空间中相互纠缠，加剧长程干扰。

Method: M-ORE基于统一近端投影公式推导出闭式解，利用Sherman-Morrison递归实现每编辑恒定的计算开销；对文本栈和视觉投影器分别维护模块级局部性统计量，避免视觉主导的更新扭曲；在固定的正交低秩编辑子空间中进行连续更新，以缓解长时域干扰。

Result: 在多个MLLM骨干网络和在线编辑基准上，M-ORE在可靠性、通用性和局部性方面持续优于强基线方法，并实现了良好的质量-效率权衡。

Conclusion: M-ORE有效解决了多模态大语言模型在线编辑中的跨模态冲突和编辑间干扰问题，其模态解耦和递归更新机制为终身学习场景下的模型编辑提供了高效且稳定的解决方案。

Abstract: Online model editing for multimodal large language models (MLLMs) requires assimilating a stream of corrections under tight compute and memory budgets. Yet editors developed for text-only LLMs often degrade on MLLMs: visually dominant activations skew the statistics that shape updates, causing cross-modal conflict, while sequential writes become entangled in a shared edit space and amplify long-horizon interference, causing inter-edit interference. To address these, we propose M-ORE, a modality-decoupled online recursive editor for lifelong MLLM adaptation. M-ORE is derived from a unified proximal-projection formulation and admits a closed-form update with a Sherman-Morrison recursion, yielding constant per-edit overhead. It maintains module-wise locality statistics for the text stack and the visual projector to avoid visually dominated update shaping and performs continual updates in a fixed orthogonal low-rank edit subspace via a Sherman-Morrison recursion to mitigate long-horizon interference. Experiments on multiple MLLM backbones and online editing benchmarks show that our M-ORE method consistently improves reliability, generality, and locality over strong baselines, while achieving favorable quality-efficiency scaling. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/lab-klc/M-ORE.

</details>


### [286] [OmniISR: A Unified Framework for Centralized and Federated Learning via Intermediate Supervision and Regularization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20276)
*Wei-Bin Kou,Guangxu Zhu,Ming Tang,Chen Zhang,Lisheng Wu,Lei Zhou,Yujiu Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出OmniISR统一框架，通过中间监督与正则化信号融合集中学习(CL)和联邦学习(FL)，解决异构法律框架下的优化不兼容问题，理论证明收敛性并实验验证效果提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 全球边缘智能部署面临异构法律框架，不同地区对数据聚合要求不同（CL vs. FL），导致两种优化机制不兼容，缺乏统一的理论保证。

Method: 提出OmniISR框架，在多个隐藏层引入中间监督和正则化：(1) 互信息(MI)对齐CL的内部协变量偏移和FL的客户端漂移；(2) 负熵(NE)正则化防止过自信预测、保持表示不确定性、避免设备特异性坍缩。

Result: 理论推导了统一收敛界(O(1/√T))、联邦漂移界、梯度对齐保证和逃逸时间界；实验表明OmniISR持续提升模型性能，CL-FL差距减少22.60%，在37/48配对指标中胜出。

Conclusion: OmniISR有效统一了CL和FL两种训练范式，兼具理论严谨性与实际性能优势，为跨法律框架的边缘智能部署提供了可行方案。

Abstract: The global deployment of edge intelligence operates across heterogeneous legal frameworks. While some regions permit centralized learning (CL) via cloud data aggregation, others enforce strict data localization, necessitating federated learning (FL). This operational dichotomy introduces two incompatible optimization regimes (i.e., unbiased global gradients yet coupled with internal covariate shift in CL versus biased, drift-prone local updates in FL), resulting in that any naive integration of the two lacks rigorous theoretical guarantees. To fill this gap, we propose OmniISR, a unified framework that fuses pure CL, pure FL, and hybrid CL-FL training modes via equipping intermediate supervision and regularization (ISR) signals at multiple hidden layers. Specifically, we propose (i) to use mutual-information (MI) as intermediate supervision to align shifting internal covariate in CL and client-drifting representations in FL, and (ii) to adopt negative-entropy (NE) as intermediate regularizer to penalize overconfident prediction, preserve representational uncertainty, and avoid device-specific collapse. On the theory side, we derive (i) a unified, ISR-agnostic, and non-asymptotic O(1/sqrt(T)) convergence bound that shows the introduced ISR does not violate standard SGD convergence, (ii) a federated drift-bound that quantifies the ISR-reduced client drift, (iii) a gradient-alignment guarantee that ensures non-conflicting CL and FL updates under mild bias, and (iv) an explicit escape-time bound that indicates that CL-FL hybrid mixing enlarges effective stochasticity and accelerates escape from strict saddles. Extensive experiments demonstrate that OmniISR consistently improves model performance in both centralized and federated paradigms, reduces the CL-FL gap by 22.60%, and yields 37/48 paired metric wins across multiple FL algorithms.

</details>


### [287] [ClaimDiff-RL: Fine-Grained Caption Reinforcement Learning through Visual Claim Comparison](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20278)
*Tianle Li,Xuyang Shen,Yan Ma,Rongxin Guo,Shaoxiang Chen,Jiacheng Chen,Haochen Wang,Hongyang Tang,Yucong Zhou,Yu Cheng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出ClaimDiff-RL框架，通过将原子化声明差异作为奖励单元，替代传统整体标量奖励，从而在图像描述强化学习中显式建模事实性与覆盖率之间的权衡，实验表明该方法能实现更均衡的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的长文本图像描述强化学习使用整体序列级奖励（如成对偏好、基于参考的指标），这些方法将局部错误压缩为一个标量信号，模糊了事实性（避免幻觉）与覆盖率（不遗漏显著细节）之间的权衡关系。

Method: 提出ClaimDiff-RL框架：基于参考条件的原子声明差异作为奖励单元。多模态评判器枚举视觉上可验证的差异，对每个差异进行图像验证，分配开放式错误类型和严重等级，生成每个差异的统计量用于奖励组合。

Result: 在160张图像的人工标注诊断基准、公开描述基准和VQA基准上，ClaimDiff-RL改善了幻觉与遗漏事实的平衡，保持了通用能力，在物体计数、空间关系、场景识别等多个细粒度能力维度上甚至超越了Gemini-3-Pro-Preview。

Conclusion: 带类型标签、可验证的声明差异是一种有效的奖励单元，能够实现细粒度、可诊断的图像描述强化学习。

Abstract: Long-form image captioning exposes a reward granularity problem in RL: captions are judged as whole sequences, while the important errors occur at the level of individual visual claims. A good dense caption should be both faithful and informative, avoiding hallucination without omitting salient details. Yet pairwise preferences, reference-based metrics, and holistic scalar rewards compress these local errors into a single sequence-level signal, obscuring the tradeoff between factuality and coverage. We introduce ClaimDiff-RL, a framework that uses reference-conditioned atomic claim differences as the reward unit for caption RL. Given an image, an actor caption, and a reference caption, a multimodal judge enumerates visually grounded differences, verifies each difference against the image, assigns open-vocabulary error types and severity levels, and produces per-difference statistics for reward composition. This makes hallucinated claims and omitted salient facts separately measurable and tunable. Experiments show that holistic scalar rewards can reduce hallucination by increasing missing facts, while ClaimDiff-RL exposes this faithfulness and coverage tradeoff and enables more balanced operating points. On a 160-image human-labeled diagnostic benchmark, public captioning benchmarks, and VQA benchmarks, ClaimDiff-RL improves the hallucination--missing-fact balance, preserves general capability, and even surpasses Gemini-3-Pro-Preview on several fine-grained Capability dimensions such as object counting, spatial relations, and scene recognition. These results suggest that typed, verifiable claim differences are an effective reward unit for fine-grained and diagnosable caption RL.

</details>


### [288] [Introspective X Training: Feedback Conditioning Improves Scaling Across all LLM Training Stages](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20285)
*Brandon Cui,Ximing Lu,Jaehun Jung,Syeda Nahida Akter,Hyunwoo Kim,Yuxiao Qu,David Acuna,Shrimai Prabhumoye,Yejin Choi,Prithviraj Ammanabrolu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Introspective Training (IXT)方法，利用后期训练阶段的反馈信号（如思考奖励模型生成的自然语言批评）来指导早期训练阶段（如预训练），通过前缀条件化使模型从一开始就进行质量感知训练，在7.5B-12B参数模型上实现最高2.8倍计算效率提升，并在数学和代码领域达到传统训练无法企及的性能水平。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM训练流水线包含多个阶段（预训练、后训练等），但各阶段之间缺乏有效的信息传递。后期训练阶段的动态（如后训练中的反馈信号）本可以用来指导更早阶段（如预训练）的数据选择和训练过程，从而实现更高效的扩展（scaling）。现有方法未能利用这种跨阶段的信息流动。

Method: IXT（Introspective Training）方法受离线奖励条件强化学习启发，适用于训练流水线的任何阶段。具体而言：(1) 使用思考奖励模型（thinking reward model）对数据标注基于自然语言批评的反馈；(2) 模型通过前缀条件化（prefix-conditioning）的方式，将生成的反馈与数据一起作为训练输入，使得从训练早期开始就实现质量感知训练（quality aware training），即不是所有token被平等对待。

Result: 在7.5B-12B参数的Transformer密集LLM上，从零开始训练至18万亿token的实验表明：(1) IXT弯曲了scaling曲线，在一般情况下实现最高2.8倍的计算效率提升；(2) 在数学和代码领域，IXT达到了传统训练方法无法实现的性能水平。

Conclusion: IXT通过跨训练阶段的信息传递（后训练反馈指导预训练），显著提升了LLM训练的计算效率，特别是在数学和代码等复杂领域展现出突破性性能，为更高效的LLM训练扩展提供了新范式。

Abstract: We tackle the question of how to scale more efficiently across the many, ever-growing stages of current LLM training pipelines. Our guiding intuition stems from the fact that the dynamics of later stages of the pipeline, e.g. post-training, can be used to inform earlier stages such as pre-training.
