To this end, we propose Introspective Training (or IXT), inspired by offline reward-conditioned reinforcement learning and applicable to any stage of training. IXT uses a thinking reward model to annotate data with natural language critique based feedback, enabling quality aware training from the earliest stages of the pipeline. Models are then trained by prefix-conditioning the data with the generated feedback -- ensuring that not all tokens are treated equally starting much earlier in training than usual. Comprehensive experiments on 7.5-12B transformer-based dense LLMs trained from scratch all the way up to 18 Trillion tokens seen show that our method: bends scaling curves resulting in up to 2.8x more compute efficiency generally; and reaches performance levels unachievable for models trained otherwise in domains such as math and code.

</details>


### [289] [FusionCell: Cross-Attentive Fusion of Layout Geometry and Netlist Topology for Standard-Cell Performance Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20287)
*Haoyi Zhang,Kairong Guo,Bojie Zhang,Yibo Lin,Runsheng Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: FusionCell 提出了一种双模态预测框架，将版图几何与网表拓扑显式融合，在7nm数据集上实现平均MAPE 0.92%的延迟与功耗预测，相比电路仿真加速数个数量级。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准单元的特征化依赖慢速仿真扫描，现有快速预测器忽略版图几何信息，无法捕捉耦合和版图相关效应，亟需一种能联合表示版图几何与网表拓扑的模型。

Method: FusionCell 采用双模态架构：DeiT编码器处理三层布线版图，图Transformer建模异构器件/网图，通过拓扑引导机制让网表作为结构"地图"主动查询版图相关物理区域，实现几何与拓扑的联合推理。

Result: 在基于ASAP7 PDK的7nm数据集上（19.5k+单元，149种类型），针对信号上升/下降延迟、转换时间和功耗六个指标，平均MAPE达0.92%，Spearman/Kendall排序优于基线，速度比电路仿真快数个数量级。

Conclusion: 显式融合版图几何与网表拓扑的双模态方法能有效提升标准单元性能预测精度，同时极大加速特征化流程。

Abstract: Standard cells form the building blocks of digital circuits, so their delay and power critically influence chip-level performance; yet characterization still relies on slow simulation sweeps, and many fast predictors ignore layout geometry, missing coupling and layout-dependent effects. The challenge is to jointly represent layout geometry and netlist topology so models capture fine-grained spatial details together with structural connectivity for accurate performance prediction. We introduce FusionCell, a dual-modality predictor that treats routed layout geometry and netlist topology as inputs and fuses them explicitly in a unified model. A DeiT encoder processes three-layer routed layouts, while a graph transformer models heterogeneous device/net graphs. The modalities are integrated through a topology-guided mechanism, where the netlist acts as a structural "map" to actively query relevant physical regions in the layout for joint geometric and topological reasoning. We build a 7nm dataset based on the ASAP7 PDK with over 19.5k cells spanning 149 types using automatic tools, targeting six metrics: signal rise/fall delay, transition, and power. Experimental results demonstrate that FusionCell reduces regression error, with an average MAPE of 0.92 percent, and improves Spearman/Kendall ranking over baselines, while accelerating the characterization process by orders of magnitude compared to circuit simulation.

</details>


### [290] [Plug-and-Play Spiking Operators: Breaking the Nonlinearity Bottleneck in Spiking Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20289)
*Xinzhe Yuan,Xiang Peng,Bin Gu,Huan Xiong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一个即插即用的框架，通过将Transformer中的非线性运算（除法、指数、L2范数）分解为三个基本原语，并利用LIF神经元群和位移位缩放实现脉冲友好型近似，从而在不微调的情况下支持脉冲大语言模型，且精度损失小于1%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有ANN-to-SNN转换方法主要支持Transformer的线性代数运算，但对非线性算子（如Softmax、SiLU、归一化等）的兼容性不足，这些非线性运算涉及除法、指数、范数计算，难以被标准的LIF动力学自然支持，限制了与神经形态计算约束的兼容性。

Method: 将非线性计算分解为除法、指数、L2范数三种基本原语；利用LIF神经元群的群体计算实现这些原语；结合轻量级位移位缩放来避免浮点运算；将这些原语组合为模块化的算子块，支持常见的Transformer非线性函数。

Result: 在多种大语言模型Transformer上的实验表明，选择性替换目标非线性算子后，所有评估任务的精度下降均小于1%。

Conclusion: 该框架为ANN-to-SNN转换提供了一种无需微调、即插即用的方案，有效弥合了非线性算子在神经形态计算中的适用性差距，为构建全脉冲大语言模型提供了可行路径。

Abstract: ANN-to-SNN conversion offers a practical, training-free route to spiking large language models. However, current pipelines primarily focus on spike-driven realizations for Transformer linear-algebra operations, while providing limited support for key nonlinear operators. This gap limits compatibility with neuromorphic-style execution constraints, where such nonlinearities typically require division, exponentiation, or norm computations that are not naturally supported by standard leaky integrate-and-fire dynamics. To solve this problem, we propose a plug-and-play framework that implements spike-friendly approximations for Transformer nonlinearities and integrates into existing ANN-to-SNN pipelines. Our method decomposes these nonlinear computations into three recurring primitives -- division, exponentiation, and $\ell_2$ norms -- and realizes them via population computation using LIF neuron groups, combined with lightweight bit-shift scaling to avoid floating-point arithmetic. By composing these primitives as modular operator blocks, our framework supports common Transformer nonlinearities (e.g., Softmax, SiLU, and normalization) without any fine-tuning. Experiments on a range of LLMs Transformers show that selectively replacing the targeted nonlinear operators incurs less than a $1\%$ accuracy drop across all evaluated tasks.

</details>


### [291] [Weasel: Out-of-Domain Generalization for Web Agents via Importance-Diversity Data Selection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20291)
*Fatemeh Pesaran zadeh,Seyeon Choi,Xing Han Lù,Siva Reddy,Gunhee Kim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Weasel是一种用于Web代理离线训练的轨迹选择方法，通过平衡重要性、多样性和目标中心化的AXTree剪枝，在降低训练成本的同时提升跨域泛化能力，实现约9.7-12.5倍的训练加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于LLM的Web代理在特定轨迹和领域上微调后难以泛化到域外场景，且离线训练因噪声冗余轨迹和长AXTree状态导致计算效率低下。

Method: 1) 提出Weasel轨迹选择方法，通过优化平衡单步重要性与状态、网站、交互模式多样性的目标函数，用贪心算法高效选择固定预算的子集；2) 目标中心的AXTree剪枝，仅保留围绕真实动作目标的内容；3) 用模型生成、风格一致的推理链替代专家轨迹，缓解风格不匹配问题。

Result: 在AgentTrek和NNetNav数据集上，在WebArena、WorkArena、MiniWob基准测试中，使用Qwen2.5-7B、Gemma3-4B、Qwen3-8B模型，Weasel提升了域外性能，同时实现约9.7-12.5倍的训练加速。

Conclusion: Weasel通过智能轨迹选择与剪枝，有效提升了Web代理的跨域泛化能力和训练效率。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have enabled web agents that follow natural language goals through multi-step browser interactions. However, agents fine-tuned on specific trajectories and domain often struggle to generalize out of domain, and offline training can be compute-inefficient due to noisy, redundant trajectories and long accessibility-tree (AXTree) states. To address both issues, we propose Weasel, a trajectory selection method for offline training of web agents. Weasel selects a fixed-budget subset of trajectory steps by optimizing an objective that balances unary importance with pairwise diversity over states, websites, and interaction patterns, solving efficiently with a greedy algorithm. We further improve efficiency with target-centered AXTree pruning that keeps only content around the ground-truth action target, and we mitigate style mismatch for reasoning-native models by replacing expert traces with model-generated, style-consistent rationales. Across AgentTrek and NNetNav training datasets, evaluations in WebArena, WorkArena, and MiniWob, and experiments with Qwen2.5-7B, Gemma3-4B, and Qwen3-8B, Weasel improves out-of-domain performance while reducing training cost, producing roughly 9.7-12.5$\times$ training speedups over standard fine-tuning. We make the code available at https://github.com/fatemehpesaran310/weasel.

</details>


### [292] [TreeText-CTS: Compact, Source-Traceable Tree-Path Evidence for Irregular Clinical Time-Series Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20292)
*Kwanhyung Lee,Juhwan Choi,Jongheon Kim,Joohyung Lee,Hyeongwon Jang,Eunho Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: TreeText-CTS 将不规则 EHR 轨迹转化为可读、紧凑、可追溯的树路径证据单元，在多项临床预测任务上优于现有文本接口，同时保持与数值模型相当的竞争力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数值时间序列模型虽能处理不规则 EHR 数据，但缺乏可读性；而文本接口要么序列化冗长，要么自由文本难以追溯来源。亟需一种兼具可读性与可追溯性的方法。

Method: 通过冻结 XGBoost 模型处理多尺度窗口摘要，将激活的树路径转化为阈值条件组成的确定性证据单元；再由证据选择器筛选子集，最后由语言模型编码器整合用于预测。

Result: 在 PhysioNet 2012 死亡预测、MIMIC-III 死亡预测和 PhysioNet 2019 脓毒症预测上，TreeText-CTS 在文本接口中取得最佳 AUROC 和 AUPRC，AUPRC 比最强基线提升 6.0–9.7 个百分点，且与数值模型性能相当。

Conclusion: 树路径证据构建、证据选择和语言模型组合三个模块均对性能有贡献；该方法使输入到预测器的每个证据都可检查、可追溯，弥合了可读性与可追溯性之间的鸿沟。

Abstract: Numerical time-series models can effectively process irregular electronic health record (EHR) trajectories, but they do not naturally expose the measurements and temporal patterns supporting each risk estimate as readable evidence. Existing text-based interfaces improve readability, but typically rely on either raw serialization, which is lengthy and redundant, or patient-level free-form summaries, which are difficult to trace to source measurements and time windows. To bridge this gap, we introduce TreeText-CTS (Clinical Time-Series), which converts irregular EHR trajectories into human-readable, compact, source-traceable tree-path evidence units without patient-level summarization or inference-time autoregressive decoding. TreeText-CTS routes multi-scale window summaries through frozen XGBoost models and verbalizes activated tree paths as deterministic, source-traceable evidence units composed of threshold conditions. An evidence selector assembles an informative subset of these units, which a language-model encoder then integrates for prediction. Across PhysioNet 2012 mortality, MIMIC-III mortality, and PhysioNet 2019 sepsis-onset forecasting, TreeText-CTS achieves the best AUROC and AUPRC among evaluated text-based EHR time-series interfaces, improving AUPRC by 6.0 to 9.7 absolute percentage points over the strongest prior text-based interface while remaining competitive with numerical time-series models. Ablations show that tree-path evidence construction, evidence selection, and language-model composition each contribute to performance. Because every span passed to the language-model encoder is constructed from activated tree-path threshold conditions, TreeText-CTS makes the evidence supplied to the final predictor inspectable and source-traceable.

</details>


### [293] [Quant.npu: Enabling Efficient Mobile NPU Inference for on-device LLMs via Fully Static Quantization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20295)
*Jinghe Zhang,Daliang Xu,Chenghua Wang,Weikai Xie,Tao Qi,Yun Ma,Mengwei Xu,Gang Huang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Quant.npu框架，通过可学习的量化参数、旋转矩阵和两阶段优化策略，实现面向移动NPU的全静态量化，在保持精度的同时降低最多15.1%的推理延迟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有后训练量化方法依赖动态激活量化，无法与移动设备NPU的全静态量化硬件约束兼容，需要在高保真PTQ与NPU受限推理之间搭建桥梁。

Method: 提出Quant.npu框架：(1) 可学习量化参数与旋转矩阵的整数全静态量化；(2) 旋转与位宽感知的初始化策略；(3) 面向旋转/未旋转张量的分布感知两阶段选择性优化；(4) 敏感度引导的自适应混合精度方案。

Result: 在真实移动NPU上达到与SOTA方法相当的精度，推理延迟降低最多15.1%。

Conclusion: 通过合理的初始化和选择性优化策略解决梯度不稳定问题，实现了NPU兼容的高效全静态量化。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed on mobile devices, where Neural Processing Units (NPUs) necessitate fully static quantization for optimal inference efficiency. However, existing post-training quantization (PTQ) methods predominantly rely on dynamic activation quantization, rendering them incompatible with NPU hardware constraints. To bridge the gap between high-fidelity PTQ and NPU-constrained inference, we propose Quant.npu, a integer-only fully static quantization framework. It incorporates learnable quantization parameters and rotation matrices, enabling low-bit activation-weight quantization without runtime quantization parameters re-computation. Crucially, we identify that initialization and selective optimization of quantization parameters is pivotal for optimization stability, as improper initialization and naive joint optimization induce gradient instability that disrupts the optimization of rotation matrices. To address this, we propose a rotation-and-bit-width-aware initialization tailored to diverse activation profiles and a distribution-aware selective optimization (two-stage quantization pipeline) tailored to rotated and unrotated tensors. Furthermore, we introduce a sensitivity-guided adaptive mixed-precision scheme to balance accuracy with inference efficiency. Extensive experiments on real-world mobile NPUs demonstrate that Quant.npu achieves comparable accuracy to state-of-the-art methods, while reducing inference latency by up to 15.1%.

</details>


### [294] [Spectral Unforgetting: Post-Hoc Recovery of Damaged Capabilities Without Retraining](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20296)
*Aarash Abro,Muhammad Tahir*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出DG-Hard方法，通过对微调权重更新矩阵进行Donoho-Gavish硬奇异值阈值处理，在保留目标任务性能的同时恢复被破坏的通用能力，并在14个模型/任务设置及安全对齐场景中取得最佳修复效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 微调语言模型时，虽然只针对目标任务进行优化，但模型在其他能力上会显著退化（灾难性遗忘）。现有修复方法要么需要数据，要么简单地回退到基础模型，无法保留目标任务的增益。

Method: 将微调更新Δ视为低秩任务对齐信号与类IID噪声残差的组合，对每个权重矩阵应用Donoho-Gavish硬奇异值阈值（DG-Hard），仅保留结构化高能部分，去除谱体（spectral bulk），实现无数据依赖的闭式SVD过滤。

Result: 在14个（模型，任务）设置和9个跨域保留基准上，DG-Hard在事后修复基线中达到最强的平衡修复效果。同时能在不使用任何对齐数据的情况下，恢复因良性微调而退化的安全对齐能力（三个独立安全维度）。

Conclusion: 部分微调导致的能力损失并非专业化的不可避免后果，而是权重更新中可移除的谱残差。

Abstract: Fine-tuning a language model for a target task routinely degrades capabilities the training data never explicitly threatened. We study this phenomenon, known as catastrophic forgetting, and propose a post-hoc repair solution that uses only the pretrained checkpoint $W_{\mathrm{base}}$ and its fine-tuned descendant $W_{\mathrm{ft}}$. The goal is not merely to revert the model toward the base checkpoint, but to recover capabilities damaged by fine-tuning while preserving both the target-task gains and any beneficial held-out improvements. We introduce DG-Hard, a checkpoint-only spectral repair method for the fine-tuning update $Δ= W_{\mathrm{ft}} - W_{\mathrm{base}}$. DG-Hard treats $Δ$ as a low-rank task-aligned signal embedded in an IID-like noise residual that gradient descent has no incentive to remove, and applies the Donoho-Gavish hard singular-value threshold to each weight-delta matrix, keeping the structured high-energy part of the update and removing the spectral bulk. This reduces repair to a closed-form SVD filtering step requiring no data-dependent tuning. A central difficulty is evaluation: average accuracy hides per-benchmark failures, while naive recovery scores reward models that simply revert toward the base. We therefore introduce a partition-conditional metric that separately tracks healing, preservation, non-damage, and target-task retention. Across $14$ (model, task) settings and nine cross-domain held-out benchmarks, DG-Hard achieves the strongest balanced repair among post-hoc baselines. DG-Hard also restores safety alignment degraded by benign fine-tuning on three independent safety axes, despite using no alignment data. These results suggest that part of fine-tuning-induced capability loss is not an unavoidable consequence of specialization, but a removable spectral residue in the weight update itself.

</details>


### [295] [Mechanisms of Misgeneralization in Physical Sequence Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20299)
*Kento Nishi,Raphael Tang,Karun Kumar,Core Francisco Park,Hidenori Tanaka*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 标准深度学习在训练生成序列模型时，即使每个生成的轨迹看似合理，但在物理量（如旅行距离、机械能）的聚合分布上会出现偏差，这种现象称为物理泛化错误。本文通过合成任务和实际任务（迷宫导航、双摆运动）揭示了其机制——模型类固有的局部误差通过物理测量传播导致分布偏移，并提出了基于数据偏差核的预测与干预方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 揭示和解释生成序列模型在物理领域训练时，尽管单条轨迹合理但物理量聚合分布失真的问题及其机制。

Method: 通过受控合成任务分析物理泛化错误的机制，引入数据偏差核估计局部误差，并预测物理量的分布偏移；在迷宫导航和双摆运动任务中验证。

Result: 发现物理泛化错误源于模型类典型的局部误差通过物理测量传播，导致聚合分布偏移；数据偏差核能有效预测哪些物理量会增/减质量。

Conclusion: 基于机制理解识别有前景的缓解策略，并提出基于核的干预方法。

Abstract: Generative sequence models are often trained to plan motion in physical domains, from robotics to mechanical simulations. When constructing a dataset to train such a model, engineers may curate demonstrations to specify how trajectories should be distributed over a physical quantity like travel distance or mechanical energy. For example, a roboticist building a maze navigation agent might choose demonstrations whose travel distances cover a fixed range uniformly, hoping to constrain the agent's expected power usage. We find that standard deep learning can violate this intent: each generated trajectory can seem plausible on its own, but the aggregate distribution over the physical quantity is wrong. We call this failure physical misgeneralization, and develop an account of its mechanism. Using controlled synthetic tasks, we show that physical misgeneralization arises when local errors typical of the model class propagate through the physical measurement to shift the recovered distribution. We estimate these errors with a data deviation kernel, and we use it to predict which physical quantities gain or lose mass in both our synthetic and more applied maze navigation and double-pendulum motion tasks. Finally, our mechanistic interpretation helps identify which mitigation strategies are structurally promising, and we use it to propose a kernel-informed intervention.

</details>


### [296] [Robust Subspace-Constrained Quadratic Models for Low-Dimensional Structure Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20300)
*Zheng Zhai,Xiaohui Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种鲁棒的子空间约束二次模型（SCQM），用于从高维数据中学习低维结构，能处理多种噪声分布，并设计了基于梯度的优化算法和回溯线搜索策略，实验表明在鲁棒性和重建精度上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有子空间约束二次矩阵分解（SQMF）框架对噪声分布的适应性有限，难以同时处理重尾和轻尾噪声。本文旨在提出一个更通用的模型，增强在不同噪声特性下的鲁棒性。

Method: 1. 提出子空间约束二次模型（SCQM），扩展了SQMF框架，支持广义高斯和径向拉普拉斯等噪声分布。2. 设计基于梯度的优化算法，结合回溯线搜索策略以确保收敛。3. 对ℓ_p^p和ℓ_2损失函数进行敏感性分析，解释它们在不同噪声下的行为差异。

Result: 大量数值实验验证了理论分析，SCQM在鲁棒性和重建精度上始终优于现有方法，能有效应对重尾和轻尾噪声。

Conclusion: SCQM是一种鲁棒且通用的低维结构学习方法，显著提升了噪声适应性，为高维数据分析提供了有效工具。

Abstract: In this paper, we propose a robust subspace-constrained quadratic model (SCQM) for learning low-dimensional structure from high-dimensional data. Building upon the subspace-constrained quadratic matrix factorization (SQMF) framework, the proposed model accommodates a broad class of noise distributions, including generalized Gaussian and radial Laplace models. This generalization enables reliable performance under both heavy-tailed and light-tailed noise, thereby substantially enhancing robustness across diverse data regimes. To efficiently address the resulting nonconvex optimization problem, we develop a gradient-based algorithm equipped with a backtracking line-search strategy that ensures stable and efficient convergence. In addition, we present a sensitivity analysis of the $\ell_p^p$ and $\ell_2$ loss functions, elucidating their distinct behaviors under varying noise characteristics. Extensive numerical experiments corroborate the theoretical analysis and demonstrate that the proposed approach consistently outperforms existing methods in terms of robustness and reconstruction accuracy.

</details>


### [297] [Neural Collapse by Design: Learning Class Prototypes on the Hypersphere](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20302)
*Panagiotis Koromilas,Theodoros Giannakopoulos,Mihalis A. Nicolaou,Yannis Panagakis*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文指出交叉熵（CE）和监督对比学习（SCL）两种监督分类范式均未能达到理论最优Neural Collapse（NC），并提出从CE侧引入归一化损失（NTCE/NONL）加入对比学习要素，从SCL侧证明线性探测冗余有害。最终在多个基准上逼近NC状态，提升迁移学习和鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有监督分类的两大范式——交叉熵（CE）和监督对比学习（SCL）——在实践中均未能达到理论最优的Neural Collapse（NC）状态。CE留下未约束的自由度导致退化几何结构，SCL虽在预训练阶段驱动特征趋向NC，却在后续的线性探测阶段丢弃了这一结构。作者希望弥合理论与实践的差距。

Method: 1. 从CE侧提出NTCE和NONL两种归一化损失函数，引入对比学习的关键要素：大规模有效负样本集、解耦的对齐与均匀性项。2. 从SCL侧理论证明SCL目标本身已在全程优化一个以类均值嵌入为权重的原则性分类器，线性探测不仅冗余且有害。3. 提出在SCL中直接使用固定原型（类均值嵌入）替代线性探测。

Result: 在ImageNet-1K等四个基准上：NTCE和NONL超越CE准确率，接近NC（≥95%），在4/5指标上以不到7.5%的迭代次数达到CE收敛的NC水平；SCL使用固定原型匹配线性探测性能，无需数小时的分类器训练；迁移学习平均提升+5.5%，严重类别不平衡下提升高达+8.7%，ImageNet-C上mCE更低。

Conclusion: 重新将监督学习定义为超球面上的原型学习，两条路径均能按设计达到NC状态。NTCE/NONL从CE路径弥合了与NC的差距，SCL固定原型则避免了线性探测对NC结构的破坏，两者的统一视角是原型对比学习。

Abstract: Supervised classification has a theoretical optimum, Neural Collapse (NC), yet neither of its two dominant paradigms reaches it in practice. Cross entropy (CE) leaves radial degrees of freedom unconstrained and converges to a degenerate geometry, while supervised contrastive learning (SCL) drives features toward NC during pretraining but discards this structure in a post hoc linear probing phase. We show that both paradigms are different appearances of the same method, prototype contrast on the unit hypersphere, and that closing the gap requires fixing each at its specific point of failure. From the CE side, we propose NTCE and NONL, two normalized losses that import contrastive optimization's missing ingredients into classifier learning: a large effective negative set and decoupled alignment and uniformity terms. From the SCL side, we prove that SCL's objective already optimizes throughout training for a principled classifier whose weights are the class mean embeddings, making linear probing both redundant and harmful. Empirically, on four benchmarks including ImageNet-1K, NTCE and NONL surpass CE accuracy, closely approximate NC ($\geq 95\%$), and match CE's converged NC on 4/5 metrics in under $7.5\%$ of its iterations, while SCL with fixed prototypes matches linear probing without the hours-long classifier training phase. The learned geometry yields $+5.5\%$ mean relative improvement in transfer learning, up to $+8.7\%$ under severe class imbalance, and lower mCE on ImageNet-C, recasting supervised learning as prototype learning on the hypersphere, with NC reached by design on both paths.

</details>


### [298] [AirfoilGen: A valid-by-construction and performance-aware latent diffusion model for airfoil generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20303)
*Zhijie Yang,Min Tang,Qiang Zou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出AirfoilGen，一种通过圆扫表示法和条件潜扩散模型实现几何有效且性能可控的翼型生成方法，并在20万+翼型数据集上验证了98.41%的性能调控精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度学习翼型生成方法存在几何无效（生成形状不符合翼型基本特征）和物理可控性差（难以有效调节气动性能如升力系数、阻力系数）两大问题。

Method: 提出圆扫表示法（circle sweeping representation）约束生成过程以保证几何有效性；利用Transformer将翼型编码为向量嵌入，再基于条件扩散模型在潜空间中根据目标气动性能（升/阻力系数）进行去噪生成。

Result: 在自建的20万+翼型数据集上，平均性能调控精度达98.41%，远优于现有方法的几何有效性和性能可控性。

Conclusion: AirfoilGen通过先天几何约束+潜空间条件扩散的设计，实现了对翼型形状和气动性能的双重精确控制，为数据驱动的翼型设计提供了更可靠的范式。

Abstract: Airfoil shape design is a fundamental task in aerospace engineering, with a direct impact on flight stability and fuel consumption. Deep learning has recently emerged as a promising tool for this task, but existing deep generative approaches remain limited in both geometric validity and physical controllability. They offer little control over the generated shapes, yielding invalid geometries, and they typically do not condition effectively on aerodynamic performance. To address these issues, this paper proposes AirfoilGen, a valid-by-construction and performance-aware latent diffusion model for airfoil. It first introduces a novel airfoil representation scheme, the circle sweeping representation, to constrain the generative process so that output shapes respect essential airfoil characteristics. It then enables explicit control over aerodynamic performance (e.g., lift and drag coefficients) by operating in a learned latent space: a transformer model encodes airfoil shapes into vector embeddings, and a conditional diffusion model denoises Gaussian noise into these latent embeddings while incorporating target aerodynamic performance. In addition, this paper presents a new dataset of over 200,000 airfoils, which is substantially larger than the widely used UIUC airfoil dataset (1,650 airfoils) and more suitable for training modern deep generative models. Experiments demonstrate that AirfoilGen enables airfoil generation with far greater geometric validity and aerodynamic performance controllability than previously achievable, with an average performance-conditioning accuracy of 98.41%.

</details>


### [299] [WaveGraphNet: Physics-Consistent Guided-Wave Damage Localization through Coupled Inverse-Forward Graph Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20311)
*Vinay Sharma,Aditya Bharade,Olga Fink*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: WaveGraphNet 提出了一种耦合逆向前向图学习框架，用于碳纤维增强聚合物（CFRP）板的导波损伤定位。通过将传感器布局建模为图，逆分支将图结构化的谱特征映射到损伤位置，前向分支预测路径能量偏差模式。训练中前向分支作为物理正则项，提升模型在稀疏传感和有限训练数据下的外推鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 导波结构健康监测在复合材料板中实现损伤定位时，由于仅有有限的损伤位置可用于训练，导致模型对未见区域泛化能力差。现有方法在稀疏传感布局下，从pitch-catch测量推断缺陷空间位置的约束较弱。

Method: 提出 WaveGraphNet 框架：1) 将传感器布局显式建模为图（节点为换能器，边为传播路径）；2) 逆分支将图结构化的差分导波响应谱特征映射到损伤位置；3) 前向分支预测候选位置对应的路径能量偏差模式；4) 前向分支作为物理一致正则项，约束逆分支的输出与实测波响应能量重分布一致。

Result: 在基准测试中，WaveGraphNet 在稀疏导波传感下提供了强定位模型，并且相比非图方法和图基线方法，在向未见过区域外推时表现出更强的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 耦合逆向前向图学习策略在有限空间覆盖的导波定位任务中具有潜力，能够有效提升模型的外推能力。

Abstract: Guided-wave structural health monitoring enables damage localization in composite plates using sparse networks of bonded piezoelectric transducers. However, inferring the spatial location of defects from pitch-catch measurements remains weakly constrained when only a limited set of damage locations is available for training. As a result, models trained to predict defect locations may perform well on seen cases but generalize poorly to unseen regions of the structure.
  This paper proposes WaveGraphNet, a coupled inverse--forward graph learning framework for guided-wave damage localization in Carbon Fiber Reinforced Polymer (CFRP) plates. The sensing layout is explicitly modeled as a graph, where transducers are represented as nodes and measured propagation paths define the graph connectivity. An inverse branch maps graph-structured spectral descriptors of differential guided-wave responses to a damage location, while a forward branch predicts the path-wise energy-deviation patterns of measured wave responses associated with a candidate location. During training, the forward branch serves as a physics-consistent regularizer, discouraging location estimates that are numerically plausible but inconsistent with the measured redistribution of wave-response energy. This coupling encourages agreement between inferred damage coordinates and the underlying wave propagation behavior.
  Within this benchmark, the proposed graph-based formulation provides a strong localization model for sparse guided-wave sensing and demonstrates improved robustness in extrapolation to held-out regions compared to both non-graph and graph baselines. These results highlight the potential of coupled inverse-forward graph learning as an effective strategy for guided-wave localization under limited spatial coverage.

</details>


### [300] [Less Data, Faster Training: repeating smaller datasets speeds up learning via sampling biases](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20314)
*Jingwen Liu,Ezra Edelman,Surbhi Goel,Bingbin Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了“小数据集vs大数据集”的反直觉现象：在更少样本上重复训练反而比使用更大数据集更省计算量，并论证了这种加速源于采样偏差引发的逐层增长，尤其在推理任务中可主动利用该归纳偏置。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 揭示“用小数据集重复训练反而比用大数据集更省算力”这一反直觉现象的成因，解释其无法被现有理论涵盖的机理，并探索将其从数据稀缺时的被动策略转变为主动优化手段的可能性。

Method: 通过理论分析和多种干预实验，证明小数据集加速源于采样偏差带来的逐层增长效应，并在算法任务、架构和优化器上验证现象的普遍性。

Result: 小数据集+多重复在多种任务、架构和优化器上一致优于大数据集+少重复，节省计算量；该现象由采样偏差导致的逐层增长机制驱动。

Conclusion: 小数据集多重复不仅是数据稀缺时的退而求其次，更可作为有利的优化归纳偏置被主动利用，尤其适用于推理任务。

Abstract: This work investigates the ``small-vs-large gap'', where repeating on fewer samples can lead to compute saving during training compared to using a larger dataset. This is observed across algorithmic tasks, architectures and optimizers and cannot be explained using prior theory. We argue that the speedup comes from appropriate layer-wise growth enabled by sampling biases, which is more pronounced when the dataset size is smaller. We provide both theoretical analysis and empirical evidence from various interventions. Our results suggest that using a smaller dataset with more repetitions is not just a fallback strategy under data scarcity, but can be proactively leveraged as a favorable inductive biases for optimization, particularly in reasoning tasks.

</details>


### [301] [Causal Unlearning in Collaborative Optimization: Exact and Approximate Influence Reversal under Adversarial Contributions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20341)
*Ali Mahdavi,Azadeh Zamanifar,Amirfarhad Farhadi,Omid Kashefi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出HF-KCU方法，通过Krylov子空间共轭梯度迭代近似影响函数，实现联邦学习中高效删除客户端数据贡献，计算复杂度从O(d³)降至O(kd)，在保持精度的同时获得47.75倍加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 联邦学习系统必须支持数据删除请求以符合隐私法规，但每次删除后从头重训练计算代价过高。

Method: 通过Krylov子空间中共轭梯度迭代近似影响函数移除客户端贡献（复杂度O(kd)）；引入因果加权机制确保仅持有被删除数据的客户端接收参数更新；设计鲁棒性机制应对Hessian和梯度的有界对抗扰动。

Result: 在CIFAR-10上相比重训练实现47.75倍加速，测试精度仅下降0.60%（71.16% vs 71.76%）；成员推理攻击成功率为0.499，与重训练模型一致；Krylov近似误差收敛保证为O((√k-1)/(√k+1))。

Conclusion: HF-KCU兼具高效性与精确性，适用于异步删除请求和计算预算受限的生产环境联邦系统，更新具有可解释性且不影响未受影响的客户端。

Abstract: Federated learning systems must support data deletion requests to comply with privacy regulations, yet retraining from scratch after each deletion is computationally prohibitive. We present HF-KCU, a method that removes a client's contribution by approximating the influence function through conjugate gradient iterations in Krylov subspaces, reducing complexity from O(d^3) to O(kd) where k<<d.A causal weighting mechanism ensures that only clients holding the deleted data receive parameter updates, preventing spurious changes to unaffected clients. Our method is designed to handle bounded adversarial perturbations to the Hessian and gradient, providing graceful degradation under realistic threat models. We validate HF-KCU across convolutional (ResNet-18, SimpleCNN) and transformer (ViT-Lite) architectures on CIFAR-10, MNIST, and Fashion-MNIST. On CIFAR-10 under Dirichlet (alpha=0.5) partitioning, HF-KCU achieves 47.75 times speedup over retraining while maintaining test accuracy within 0.60% of the rational baseline(71.16 vs 71.76 %). Membership inference attacks on the forget set yield success rates of 0.499 matching the retrained model and confirming effective privacy restoration. We provide convergence guarantees showing that the Krylov approximation error decreases as O((k ^1/2-1)/(k^1/2+1)) where k is the Hessian condition number. The causal weighting mechanism ensures surgical updates, where only clients holding deleted data are modified, preserving model quality for unaffected participants and avoiding the instability of gradient-based approaches in asynchronous federated settings. This design provides interpretability as each update is directly traceable to the influence of the deleted data. The method's efficiency and precision make it suitable for production federated systems where deletion requests arrive asynchronously and computational budgets are constrained.

</details>


### [302] [Symmetrization of Loss Functions for Robust Training of Neural Networks in the Presence of Noisy Labels](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20347)
*Alexandre Lemire Paquin,Brahim Chaib-Draa,Philippe Giguère*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了多类损失函数的对称化方法，从交叉熵损失导出多类unhinged loss，证明了它是唯一凸的多类对称损失，并提出了SGCE和alpha-MAE两种新损失函数，在噪声标签 benchmarks上表现良好。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标注训练集昂贵且易出错，需要设计对标签噪声鲁棒的损失函数，对称性条件为此提供了理论保证。

Method: 通过将多类损失函数分解为对称分量和类无关项，对交叉熵损失进行对称化得到多类unhinged loss；提出SGCE和alpha-MAE两种损失函数，在unhinged loss和MAE之间插值，并可控制beta-平滑性。

Result: 证明多类unhinged loss是唯一凸的多类对称损失；任何对称损失在分数向量相等处的线性近似等价于多类unhinged loss；实验在标准噪声标签基准上取得竞争力表现。

Conclusion: 对称化方法为损失函数设计提供理论基础，SGCE和alpha-MAE在鲁棒性和可调性之间取得良好平衡。

Abstract: Labeling a training set is often expensive and susceptible to errors, making the design of robust loss functions for label noise an important problem. The symmetry condition provides theoretical guarantees for robustness to such noise. In this work, we study a symmetrization method arising from the unique decomposition of any multi-class loss function into a symmetric component and a class-insensitive term. In particular, symmetrizing the cross-entropy loss leads to a linear multi-class extension of the unhinged loss. Unlike in the binary case, the multi-class version must have specific coefficients in order to satisfy the symmetry condition. Under suitable assumptions, we show that this multi-class unhinged loss is the unique convex multi-class symmetric loss. We also show that it has a fundamental local role: the linear approximation of any symmetric loss around score vectors with equal components is equivalent to the multi-class unhinged loss. We then introduce SGCE and alpha-MAE, two loss functions that interpolate between the multi-class unhinged loss and the Mean Absolute Error while allowing control of the beta-smoothness of the loss. Experiments on standard noisy-label benchmarks show competitive performance compared with existing robust loss functions.

</details>


### [303] [Consistently Informative Soft-Label Temperature for Knowledge Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20357)
*Hoang-Chau Luong,Nghia Van Vo,Kaiqi Zhao,Lingwei Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出CIST方法，为教师和学生模型分别分配样本自适应的温度，解决传统知识蒸馏中固定温度导致的知识不一致问题，在视觉和语言任务上均取得改进。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统知识蒸馏使用固定温度存在两个问题：(1) 固定温度是样本无关的，不同样本的logit尺度和学习难度不同，导致教师软标签熵值高度不一致——有的过于尖锐缺乏类间信息，有的过度平滑丢失类别判别信息；(2) 教师与学生共享相同温度，忽视了它们之间的容量不匹配，导致logit尺度对齐过于刚性。

Method: 提出CIST(Consistently Informative Soft-label Temperature)，为教师和学生分别分配样本自适应的温度。具体包括：(1) 为教师和学生各自计算样本级自适应温度；(2) 教师软标签保持一致性信息；(3) 根据教师置信度和学生学习难度重新加权蒸馏目标。理论上证明教师标签熵主要由最大logit与温度的比值决定。

Result: 实验在视觉和语言蒸馏任务上进行，CIST缓解了固定温度导致的不一致性问题，相比标准KD和强基线方法取得一致改进，且计算开销可忽略不计。

Conclusion: CIST通过样本自适应的双温度机制，有效解决了传统知识蒸馏中温度设置的固有问题，兼顾了教师软标签的信息一致性与师生之间的容量差异，是一种轻量且有效的改进方案。

Abstract: Knowledge distillation (KD) transfers knowledge from a high-capacity teacher to a compact student by matching their predictive distributions, with temperature scaling serving as a central mechanism for smoothing teacher predictions and exposing informative "dark knowledge" beyond the hard label. However, the standard fixed-temperature design is inherently sample-agnostic. Since samples differ in logit scale and learning difficulty, a single global temperature produces teacher soft labels with highly inconsistent entropy: some predictions remain overly sharp and provide limited inter-class information, whereas others become over-smoothed and lose class-discriminative information. Moreover, sharing the same temperature between teacher and student further imposes rigid logit-scale alignment despite their capacity mismatch. To address these limitations, we propose CIST (Consistently Informative Soft-label Temperature), which assigns separate sample-wise adaptive temperatures to the teacher and student. This design produces consistently informative teacher soft labels while relaxing rigid teacher--student logit-scale matching. It also reweights the distillation objective according to teacher confidence and student learning difficulty. Theoretically, we show that teacher-label entropy is largely governed by the ratio between the maximum teacher logit and the temperature, providing a principled basis for adaptive smoothing. Empirically, CIST mitigates the inconsistency induced by fixed temperature, and experiments on both vision and language distillation tasks show consistent improvements over standard KD and strong baselines with negligible computational overhead.

</details>


### [304] [Nonlocal operator learning for fMRI encoding and decoding tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20389)
*Andreas Kramer,Saugat Acharya,Alice Giola,Emanuele Zappala*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出基于神经积分算子的fMRI编解码模型，通过非局部时空上下文建模，在解码和编码任务中验证了长时窗和全脑记录的优势，发现积分算子能有效捕捉脑动力学的分布式结构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: fMRI数据具有高维时空结构，传统方法在预测和解码中面临挑战，亟需能够有效捕获非局部时空依赖关系的新型模型架构。

Method: 构建隐空间神经积分算子框架，在辅助空间中执行定点迭代，通过解码器进行刺激分类和预测；系统比较短/长时空窗口及视觉皮层vs全脑记录的影响。

Result: 长时窗在解码和编码任务中均提升性能，生成的隐空间具有更清晰的类别分离和更结构化的表示；编码任务绝对性能中等但长时窗仍有一致增益。

Conclusion: 神经积分算子是建模fMRI动力的有前景框架，扩大时空上下文对预测和表示学习均有益，捕获脑动力学的分布式非局部结构需要专门设计的模型架构。

Abstract: Functional MRI data exhibit high-dimensional spatiotemporal structure, making both prediction and decoding challenging. In this work, we investigate neural integral-operator-based models for encoding and decoding tasks in fMRI, with particular emphasis on the role of nonlocal spatiotemporal context. We implement a latent neural integral operator framework that performs fixed point iterations in an auxiliary space from which classification and stimuli prediction is performed via a decoder. We evaluate our model on two open-source fMRI datasets.
  Our experiments examine both decoding of stimuli from fMRI recordings and encoding of fMRI dynamics from stimulus representations. A main focus is the effect of spatiotemporal context: we systematically compare short and long temporal windows, as well as the use of visual cortex vs whole brain recordings, and analyze their influence on performance and latent-space geometry. Across tasks and datasets, larger temporal windows generally improve results and produce more structured learned representations. In decoding experiments, the learned latent space often provides clearer class separation than the raw data. In encoding experiments, although absolute performance remains moderate due to the difficulty of the task, longer temporal windows still yield consistent gains.
  These findings suggest that neural integral operators provide a promising framework for modeling fMRI dynamics and that broader spatiotemporal context can be beneficial for both prediction and representation learning. More broadly, the results indicate that exploiting distributed nonlocal structure in brain dynamics requires model architectures specifically designed to capture such dependencies.

</details>


### [305] [Score-Based Causal Discovery of Latent Variable Causal Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20396)
*Ignavier Ng,Xinshuai Dong,Haoyue Dai,Biwei Huang,Peter Spirtes,Kun Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了基于分数的因果结构学习方法，能够识别包含潜变量的因果结构，并提供了可识别性保证、分数等价性和一致性证明，实验验证了方法的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的基于约束的潜变量因果发现方法存在测试顺序依赖、误差累积、显著性水平选择困难等问题，而基于分数的方法（如GES）在处理潜变量时极具挑战性，因此需要开发适用于潜变量的分数方法。

Method: 提出一种精心设计的评分函数，证明其具有分数等价性和一致性；对观测变量边际下的自由度进行刻画，并据此开发了离散和连续两类基于分数的学习方法。

Result: 理论证明了所提评分函数的分数等价性和一致性；统一了多种现有基于约束的方法；实验验证了方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 基于分数的潜变量因果发现方法是可行且有效的，能够克服约束方法的局限性，并为不同结构假设下的方法提供了统一视角。

Abstract: Identifying latent variables and the causal structure involving them is essential across various scientific fields. While many existing works fall under the category of constraint-based methods (with e.g. conditional independence or rank deficiency tests), they may face empirical challenges such as testing-order dependency, error propagation, and choosing an appropriate significance level. These issues can potentially be mitigated by properly designed score-based methods, such as Greedy Equivalence Search (GES) (Chickering, 2002) in the specific setting without latent variables. Yet, formulating score-based methods with latent variables is highly challenging. In this work, we develop score-based methods that are capable of identifying causal structures containing causally-related latent variables with identifiability guarantees. Specifically, we show that a properly formulated scoring function can achieve score equivalence and consistency for structure learning of latent variable causal models. We further provide a characterization of the degrees of freedom for the marginal over the observed variables under multiple structural assumptions considered in the literature, and accordingly develop both exact and continuous score-based methods. This offers a unified view of several existing constraint-based methods with different structural assumptions. Experimental results validate the effectiveness of the proposed methods.

</details>


### [306] [Decomposing MXFP4 quantization error for LLM reinforcement learning: reducible bias, recoverable deadzone, and an irreducible floor](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20402)
*Xiaocan Li,Shiliang Wu,Zheng Shen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文首次将MXFP4低精度训练中的量化误差精确分解为三个可解释的组件（scale bias, deadzone truncation, grid noise），并揭示了每个组件如何分别主导RL训练的不同失败模式，进而提出针对性但非互斥的修正方法，在Qwen2.5-3B和Qwen3-30B-A3B-Base上分别恢复BF16精度的0.7%和3.0%以内。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MXFP4算术可显著加速LLM的RL后训练，但量化误差导致严重的精度下降。现有工作将量化误差视为单一的噪声项，忽视了其内部的异质性机制，无法准确理解量化误差如何损害训练过程。

Method: 1) 理论层面：对MXFP4量化误差进行精确的三项分解（scale bias、deadzone truncation、grid noise），并证明每个组件分别主导不同的RL训练路径。2) 实践层面：提出三种针对性修正——Macro-block scaling（减少scale bias）、Outlier Fallback（恢复deadzone条目，同时部分减少scale bias）、Adaptive Quantization Noise / AQN（控制policy熵）。

Result: 在Qwen2.5-3B dense模型上，修正后的MXFP4训练精度恢复至BF16的0.7%以内；在Qwen3-30B-A3B-Base MoE模型上，恢复至3.0%以内。

Conclusion: 量化误差并非单一噪声，其内部结构对RL训练的不同环节有截然不同的影响。通过分解并针对性修正每个误差成分，可在保持MXFP4计算效率的同时显著降低精度损失，为大规模LLM的RL后训练提供实用的低精度方案。

Abstract: MXFP4 arithmetic can dramatically accelerate reinforcement learning (RL) post-training of large language models (LLMs), yet the quantization error introduces severe accuracy degradation. Existing work treats the quantization error as a monolithic noise term, missing the distinct mechanisms upon interpreting how quantization error damages training. We prove an exact three-way decomposition of quantization error and show how each component dominates a distinct RL training pathway. Our theoretical and empirical analysis decomposes the MXFP4 quantization error into three additive components: "scale bias" from power-of-two rounding, "deadzone truncation" from zeroing small values, and "grid noise" from rounding to the nearest 4-bit grid. Each component dominates a distinct RL failure mode: scale bias accumulates multiplicatively through the backward pass, affecting gradient accuracy; deadzone truncation degrades rollout quality; and grid noise raises the policy's entropy. We combine corrections that are RL failure mode-targeted but not component-exclusive: Macro-block scaling to reduce scale bias, Outlier Fallback recovers deadzone entries, but also partially reduces scale bias induced error, and Adaptive Quantization Noise (AQN) for controlling the policy entropy. On Qwen2.5-3B dense and Qwen3-30B-A3B-Base mixture-of-experts model, the targeted corrections recover BF16 accuracy to within 0.7% and 3.0% respectively.

</details>


### [307] [Spectral Souping: A Unified Framework for Online Preference Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20408)
*Yinlam Chow,Guy Tennenholtz,Ted Yun,James Harrison,Arthur Gretton,Andre Barreto,Bo Dai*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Spectral Souping框架，通过发现LLM中的普适频谱表征实现高效在线偏好对齐，利用模型合并技术将多个专业化策略策略在推理时融合，无需在线重训练即可动态适应个体用户偏好。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RLHF仅对齐群体平均偏好，无法处理个体用户多样且冲突的需求。

Method: 两阶段方法：1) 离线学习一组基于不同偏好维度的专业化策略基；2) 在线推理时通过"炖汤"(souping)方式合并这些策略的输出或参数，实现快速适应。

Result: 在在线偏好对齐基准测试中显著优于现有SOTA方法。

Conclusion: 该框架提供了一种可扩展且计算高效的方案，用于动态适应LLM到个体用户偏好。

Abstract: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) effectively aligns Large Language Models (LLMs) with aggregate human preferences but often fails to address the diverse and conflicting needs of individual users. To overcome this issue, we introduce Spectral Souping, a unified framework for efficient, online preference alignment. Our contribution is the discovery of a universal spectral representation within LLMs, which is proven to be highly amenable to model merging. This theoretical insight enables a two-phase methodology: we first learn a basis of specialized policies offline, each focused on a distinct, fine-grained preference dimension. An online adaptation algorithm then efficiently ``soups'' these policies at inference time, either by merging their outputs or parameters, enabling rapid model adaptation without the need for costly online retraining w.r.t. tailored preference rewards. Experiments on online preference alignment benchmarks demonstrate that our method achieves significant performance improvements over existing state-of-the-art approaches, presenting a scalable and computationally efficient solution for dynamically adapting LLMs to individual user preferences.

</details>


### [308] [Supervised Latent Restructuring for Small-Data Quantum Learning in Plant Phenomics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20413)
*Alakananda Mitra,David H. Fleisher,Vangimalla Reddy,Chittaranjan Ray*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 针对高维小样本生物数据，提出PCA+LDA压缩+量子核对齐的混合工作流。发现监督式潜在重构能改善几何可分性，但经典分类器存在压缩权衡，且量子核对齐在强压缩下性能有限，表明表示几何是小样本量子学习的关键设计变量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高维生物数据（如植物表型组学）中特征维度与样本量严重不匹配，在小样本场景下传统核方法因潜在压缩丢失类别区分结构而判别力下降，亟需探索更适合的表示学习策略。

Method: 将1280维深度图像嵌入→PCA压缩至64维→LDA监督重构至11维→在NVIDIA L40S上执行GPU加速的量子核对齐（QKA）。

Result: 监督潜在重构使轮廓系数从原始空间的0.003和PCA-64的-0.006提升至LDA-11的0.197；但经典分类器表现分化（线性SVM和XGBoost提升，RBF-SVM和随机森林下降），QKA在约束优化预算下仍具挑战性。

Conclusion: 表示几何是小样本量子学习的关键设计变量，仅靠潜在几何不足以获得强可训练的量子性能，揭示了从激进压缩的生物表示中恢复非线性判别结构的实际困难。

Abstract: High-dimensional biological data often exhibit a severe mismatch between feature dimensionality and sample size, making reliable classification difficult in extremely small-data regimes. In these settings, kernel methods can lose discriminative power when latent compression fails to preserve class-separating structure. We study this problem in fine-grained plant phenomics and propose a hybrid workflow that compresses 1280-dimensional deep image embeddings into a 64-dimensional PCA space and then restructures them into an 11-dimensional supervised latent space using Linear Discriminant Analysis (LDA), followed by GPU-accelerated Quantum Kernel Alignment (QKA) on NVIDIA L40S hardware. Empirically, supervised latent restructuring substantially improves the geometric separability of the compressed representation, increasing the Silhouette coefficient from 0.003 in the raw embedding space and -0.006 in PCA-64 to 0.197 in the supervised LDA-11 space. However, downstream classical evaluation reveals a clear compression trade-off: Linear SVM and XGBoost improve in the restructured latent space, whereas RBF-SVM and Random Forest degrade under the same 11-dimensional bottleneck. Under a constrained optimization budget, QKA in this regime remains challenging, indicating that latent geometry alone is not sufficient for strong trainable quantum performance. These findings position representation geometry as a central design variable in small-data quantum learning and expose the practical difficulty of recovering nonlinear discriminative structure from aggressively compressed biological representations.

</details>


### [309] [Miller-Index-Based Latent Crystallographic Fracture Plane Reasoning with Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20416)
*Qinwu Xu,Yifan Jiang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 研究多模态大语言模型能否利用米勒指数作为结构化潜在表征来推理断裂几何，实验表明在理想条件下模型可进行潜在推理并能在不适用时拒绝该表征。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索MLLMs是否能够利用晶体学中的米勒指数作为结构化潜在表征，实现对断裂几何的物理感知推理，并评估其在不同条件下的适用性边界。

Method: 将米勒指数z=(h,k,l)形式化为控制理想平面断裂的潜在变量，评估两种能力：(i)潜在推理——从视觉观测映射到平面假设；(ii)潜在适用性评估——判断给定断裂图像是否适合使用该表征。在合成数据、2D-3D几何对照对以及多种材料（陶瓷、玻璃、金属、混凝土）的真实断裂图像上进行实验。

Result: MLLMs在理想化设置中能够可靠地执行潜在推理，并且在底层物理不支持时能够拒绝使用米勒指数这个潜在表征。

Conclusion: MLLMs可以作为具有物理感知的推理系统，在有结构化潜在先验条件（且明确建模了有效域）时发挥作用。

Abstract: We study whether multimodal large language models (MLLMs) can leverage crystallographic plane indices (Miller indices) as a structured latent representation for reasoning about fracture geometry. We formulate Miller indices $z = (h,k,l)$ as a latent variable governing idealized planar fracture and evaluate two complementary capabilities: (i) latent inference, where the model maps visual observations to plane hypotheses under physically valid conditions, and (ii) latent applicability assessment, where the model determines whether such a representation is meaningful for a given fracture image.
  Through extensive experiments spanning synthetic data, controlled 2D--3D geometric pairs, and real-world fracture images across multiple material classes -- including ceramics, glass, metals, and concrete -- we show that MLLMs can reliably perform latent inference in idealized settings and, critically, can reject the latent representation when the underlying physics does not support it. These results suggest that MLLMs can act as physics-aware reasoning systems conditioned on structured latent priors, provided that the domain of validity is explicitly modeled.

</details>


### [310] [Can Conversational XAI Improve User Performance? An Experimental Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20439)
*Sven Kruschel,Julian Rosenberger,Lasse Bohlen,Mathias Kraus,Patrick Zschech*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本研究提出了一种评估对话式XAI助手的实验设计，初步结果（N=42）显示两种助手下用户均显著优于模型，但助手类型间无显著差异，且整体参与度不高。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有XAI技术未能有效提升用户绩效，对话式XAI助手有潜力但缺乏实证证据，需要严格评估其对客观绩效指标的影响。

Method: 采用可解释性预测模型设计实验，设置用户可通过识别和补偿系统错误超越模型的条件，比较对话式助手与问答式助手的效果。

Result: 42名参与者在两种助手条件下均显著优于模型，但助手类型间无显著绩效差异，用户整体参与度中等。

Conclusion: 实验设计有效，后续全规模研究需增强用户参与度干预，并探究改进预测的深层机制。

Abstract: Explainable AI (XAI) techniques aim to provide insights into predictive models and enhance user performance, yet they often fall short of these expectations. Conversational XAI assistants promise to overcome such limitations, but empirical evidence on their impact on objective performance measures remains limited. We propose an experimental design for evaluating explanation assistance through prediction accuracy, model understanding, and error identification. Using an explainable-by-design prediction model, we create conditions where users can outperform the model by identifying and compensating for systematic errors. We compare conversational assistance against Q&A-based assistance to assess which better supports users in working with model explanations. Preliminary results from testing our experimental design show that participants (N=42) in both treatments significantly outperformed the model but reveal no performance differences between assistance types and modest engagement overall. These findings inform refinements for our planned full study, including enhanced engagement interventions and investigation of the mechanisms driving improved predictions.

</details>


### [311] [Group-Algebraic Tensors: Provably-optimal Equivariant Learning and Physical Symmetry Discovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20440)
*Paulina Hoyos,Shashanka Ubaru,Dongsung Huh,Vasileios Kalantzis,Kenneth L. Clarkson,Misha Kilmer,Haim Avron,Lior Horesh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了$\star_G$张量代数框架，将群等变性从架构约束转变为代数内在性质，实现了对称保持张量分解的最优性保证、多重对称性的Kronecker组合，以及600行Lean 4的形式化验证。该框架提供封闭形式的不可约表示分解和基于数据驱动的对称群发现能力，在QM9分子数据集上以$\sim50-90\times$更少的参数实现竞争性预测，并自主恢复了角动量的Wigner-Eckart选择规则。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有等变神经网络（ENNs）虽能保持对称性，但无法提供封闭形式的每个不可约表示（irrep）的分解、无法实现对称保持张量近似的最优性保证、也无法从数据中发现最适配的对称群。作者旨在建立一个框架，将等变性作为代数内在性质而非架构约束，从而克服这些结构性限制。

Method: (i) 定义由任意有限群$G$的乘法规则驱动的$\star_G$张量代数；(ii) 提出$\star_G$-SVD，具备Eckart-Young最优性保证；(iii) 利用Kronecker积（$F_{G_1} \otimes F_{G_2}$）组合多重对称性；(iv) 用Lean 4形式化验证$\star_G$代数（600行代码）；(v) 使用$\star_G$-SVD结合岭回归进行预测和分解。

Result: (1) $\star_G$-SVD是首个对称保持张量近似的最优性保证，精确且多项式时间可解；(2) 在QM9上，$\star_G$-SVD+岭回归以$\sim50-90\times$少于参数匹配MLP的参数实现预测；(3) 将QM9分子几何分解到手性八面体子群时，自主恢复了角动量的Wigner-Eckart选择规则：标量属性以A$_1$为主，偶极分量为T$_1$主导，各向同性极化率对$l=1$不敏感（符合$l=0\oplus l=2$分解），T$_1$/A$_1$预测比将矢量和标量可观测值以5倍因子区分。

Conclusion: 代数等变性与架构等变性并非更快更好更便宜的关系，而是提供不同的数学能力：可证明最优的对称保持压缩、每个不可约表示的可解释性、以及数据驱动的物理发现。它为等变学习开辟了新的方法论路径。

Abstract: We introduce the $\star_G$ tensor algebra, in which any finite group $G$ defines the multiplication rule, making equivariance an intrinsic algebraic property rather than an architectural constraint. The framework rests on three machine-verified theoretical pillars: (i)~an Eckart-Young optimality guarantee for the $\star_G$-SVD: the first such result for symmetry-preserving tensor approximation, exact and polynomial-time; (ii)~a Kronecker factorization that composes multiple symmetries by replacing $F_G$ with $F_{G_1} \otimes F_{G_2}$ with no architectural redesign; and (iii)~a 600-line Lean~4 formalization of the $\star_G$ algebra. The framework provides capabilities that equivariant neural networks (ENNs) structurally cannot: a closed-form per-irreducible-representation decomposition of every prediction, and data-driven discovery of the symmetry group that best fits a dataset. As a non-trivial empirical demonstration, decomposing QM9 molecular geometry over the chiral octahedral subgroup of SO(3) recovers the Wigner--Eckart selection rules of angular momentum from data alone, with no quantum mechanical input: scalar properties are A$_1$-dominated, dipole components are T$_1$-dominated, the isotropic polarizability is uniquely insensitive to $l\!=\!1$ as the rank-2-trace decomposition $l\!=\!0 \oplus l\!=\!2$ requires, and the T$_1$/A$_1$ predictive-power ratio separates vector observables from scalar observables by a factor of five. On full QM9 (130{,}831 molecules), $\star_G$-SVD with ridge regression provides closed form predictions at $\sim50-90\times$ fewer parameters than parameter-matched MLPs. Algebraic equivariance thus complements architectural equivariance not as a faster-better-cheaper alternative but as a different mathematical affordance: provably-optimal symmetry-preserving compression, per-irrep interpretability, and data-driven physical discovery.

</details>


### [312] [LLM Pretraining Shapes a Generalizable Manifold: Insights into Cross-Modal Transfer to Time Series](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20449)
*Alexis Roger,Prateek Humane,Zhenghan Tai,Gwen Legate,Andrei Mircea,Vasilii Feofanov,Irina Rish*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文证明语言预训练Transformer能有效进行时间序列预测，原因在于预训练构建了可复用的流形空间，微调仅需进行低维对齐而非从头学习时序特征。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究语言预训练Transformer为何能成为有效的时间序列预测器，揭示跨模态迁移的内在机制。

Method: 通过线性探针分析冻结LLM状态、检索投影空间、对比随机初始化的优化特性、分析低秩更新和子空间对齐等方法进行系统性研究。

Result: 语言预训练构建了可复用的流形空间，产生各向异性的损失景观和相干梯度；微调仅进行低维对齐，复用已有方向而非从头学习时序基元。

Conclusion: 提出几何视角的解释：语言预训练构建流形，微调将数值动态投影到任务相关方向，解释了LLM-to-time-series迁移的有效性。

Abstract: Can language-pretrained transformers become effective time-series forecasters, and why? In this paper, we show that cross-modal transfer arises because language pretraining preconditions time series training with a reusable manifold. A linear probe on frozen LLM states decodes realistic time-series trajectories without paired supervision, and retrieval in this projected space yields competitive forecasts, showing that structure and dynamics exist before finetuning. Pretrained initialization also improves optimization, producing coherent gradients and a highly anisotropic loss landscape unlike random initialization. Finetuning then acts as low-dimensional alignment, reusing existing directions rather than learning temporal primitives from scratch, as evidenced by low-rank updates, subspace alignment, and shared features for periodicity, trend, and repetition. Together, these results support a geometric account of LLM-to-time-series transfer: language pretraining builds the manifold, and finetuning projects numerical dynamics onto task-relevant directions.

</details>


### [313] [SMA-DP: Spectral Memory-Aware Differential Privacy for Deep Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20450)
*Mohammad Partohaghighi,Roummel Marcia*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出SMA-DP-SGD，通过在DP-SGD中引入仅依赖之前私有化噪声发布的分数记忆分支，利用谱指数自适应调整记忆衰减和深度，在保持隐私透明的前提下提升差分隐私深度学习的效用，实验显示在CIFAR-100和CIFAR-10上优于多个DP优化基线，但计算开销约为DP-SGD的2.94倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: DP-SGD的高方差更新会降低在困难数据集上的效用，现有方法未能充分利用历史隐私释放信息来稳定更新方向。

Method: 提出SMA-DP-SGD，在DP-SGD基础上增加一个仅使用之前私有化噪声释放构建的分数记忆分支；利用WeightWatcher启发的幂律谱指数提供层间可靠性信号，自适应调整记忆衰减和有效记忆深度；通过私有历史对齐、范数匹配和热身激活来稳定记忆分支；保持条件敏感度结构，仅当前裁剪和乘以固定系数β的项依赖新数据。

Result: 在CIFAR-100、CIFAR-10和MNIST上取得优于多个DP优化基线的准确率，CIFAR-100和CIFAR-10上提升最大；消融实验表明β控制隐私-效用轨迹；谱和记忆诊断显示有效记忆深度为短到中等；运行时开销约为DP-SGD的2.94倍。

Conclusion: SMA-DP-SGD通过自适应私有记忆有效提升了DP-SGD的效用，但计算开销是一个实际权衡因素；谱分析机制和条件敏感度结构为后续研究提供了可扩展框架。

Abstract: Differentially private stochastic gradient descent (DP-SGD) enables private deep learning through per-example clipping and calibrated Gaussian noise, but its high-variance updates can reduce utility on challenging datasets. We propose \textbf{SMA-DP-SGD}, a \textbf{Spectral Memory-Aware Differentially Private Stochastic Gradient Descent} method that augments DP-SGD with a fractional memory branch built only from previously privatized noisy releases. WeightWatcher-inspired power-law spectral exponents provide group-wise reliability signals, instantiated layer-wise in our experiments, to adapt the decay and effective memory depth. Private-history alignment, norm matching, and warm-up activation stabilize the memory contribution. Privacy remains transparent: conditioned on the private release history, the memory branch is fixed, and the only newly data-dependent term is the current clipped sum scaled by a fixed coefficient \(β\). Hence, SMA-DP-SGD preserves a clean conditional sensitivity structure and exactly recovers group-wise DP-SGD when \(β=1\). Experiments on CIFAR-100, CIFAR-10, and MNIST show competitive or superior accuracy over several DP optimization baselines, with the largest gains on CIFAR-100 and CIFAR-10. CIFAR-10 ablations show that \(β\) controls the privacy--utility trajectory, while spectral and memory diagnostics confirm a controlled short-to-moderate effective memory depth and a small memory-branch ratio. Runtime analysis shows that the mechanism incurs additional overhead, about \(2.94\times\) DP-SGD in our CIFAR-10 implementation, revealing a practical trade-off between adaptive private memory and computational cost.

</details>


### [314] [CASCADE Conformal Prediction: Uncertainty-Adaptive Prediction Intervals for Two-Stage Clinical Decision Support](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20468)
*Ricardo Diaz-Rincon,Muxuan Liang,Adolfo Ramirez-Zamora,Benjamin Shickel*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出CASCADE框架，通过将分类任务中的认知不确定性传播到回归任务中动态调整预测区间，在帕金森病药物剂量预测中实现了对高置信度患者38.9%更窄的区间，同时保持对不确定病例的鲁棒覆盖。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 帕金森病用药管理面临疾病进展异质、患者反应多变和副作用等问题。现有AI模型预测左旋多巴等效日剂量(LEDD)时，标准的置信度量化方法无法传达预测的可靠性，导致高置信度和低置信度的临床决策被同等对待。

Method: 提出CASCADE（基于共形和分布估计的校准自适应缩放）框架。利用主分类任务（判断是否需要调整药物）的认知不确定性，通过Venn-Abers多概率不确定性映射到非一致性分数，动态缩放次级回归任务（预测调整幅度）的预测区间，实现从分类到回归的"级联效应"。

Result: 对于高置信度患者，预测区间比标准共形基线窄38.9%；对于不确定病例，区间自动扩展以保证鲁棒覆盖。

Conclusion: CASCADE框架弥合了帕金森病中离散临床决策与连续剂量预测之间的差距，实现了自适应可靠预测区间，为个性化用药管理提供了更精确的工具。

Abstract: Effective medication management in Parkinson's Disease (PD) is challenging due to heterogeneous disease progression, variable patient response, and medication side effects. While AI models can forecast levodopa equivalent daily dose (LEDD) as a measure of medication needs, standard uncertainty quantification often fails to communicate the reliability of these predictions, treating high and low confidence clinical decisions identically. We introduce CASCADE (Calibrated Adaptive Scaling via Conformal And Distributional Estimation), a novel conformal prediction framework that propagates epistemic uncertainty from a screening classifier to adapt downstream predictions. Unlike standard conformal methods that rely on auxiliary residual regression, we leverage epistemic uncertainty from a primary classification task (identifying whether a medication change is needed) to dynamically scale the prediction intervals of a secondary regression task (predicting how much change). By mapping Venn-Abers multi-probabilistic uncertainty directly to non-conformity scores, our framework achieves continuous risk adaptation. We demonstrate that this ``cascade effect'' produces highly efficient intervals for confident patients (38.9% narrower than standard conformal baselines) while automatically expanding intervals to ensure robust coverage for uncertain cases, bridging the gap between discrete clinical decision-making and continuous dose forecasting in PD.

</details>


### [315] [Training Language Agents to Learn from Experience](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20477)
*Yuval Shalev,Zifeng Ding,Mateja Jamnik*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出In-context Training (ICT)任务框架，通过强化学习训练反射模型，使其能基于过往交互经验生成系统提示，帮助语言代理在未见过的任务上自我改进，实验证明该能力可跨任务泛化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于反思的语言代理只能在单个任务实例内自我纠正，无法将经验提炼为可复用的知识以提升未来新任务的性能。作者希望解决跨任务自我改进这一尚不明确的问题。

Method: 提出ICT任务框架：反射模型观察执行者模型的轨迹并生成系统提示，以提升执行者在未来未见任务上的表现。在此基础上提出基于强化学习的训练流程，无需人工示例，直接从经验中学习如何生成有效的反思。

Result: 在ALFWorld和MiniHack两个环境中，训练后的反射模型在大多数保留任务族上优于未训练基线，且在某些情况下能泛化到训练环境之外的完全不同环境中。

Conclusion: 从经验中学习的能力本身是可以被学习的。此外，作者开源了MetaGym库，为未来自我改进语言代理的研究提供基础工具支持。

Abstract: Language agents can adapt from experience in interactive environments, but current reflection-based methods can only self-correct within a single task instance. Whether such experience can be distilled into reusable lessons that improve performance on future unseen tasks remains unclear. We address this problem by introducing the In-context Training (ICT) task, a framework for evaluating cross-task self-improvement in language agents. In ICT, a reflector model observes trajectories collected by an actor model and generates system prompts intended to improve the actor's performance on future unseen tasks. We then propose an RL-based training pipeline for learning such reflections directly from experience, without human-provided examples. Across ALFWorld and MiniHack, our trained reflectors outperform an untrained baseline on most held-out task families, showing that the ability to learn from experience can itself be learned. In some cases, we observe generalisation beyond the benchmark on which the reflector was trained, to substantially different environments. Finally, we introduce MetaGym, a generic Python library for constructing meta-environments, enabling future research on self-improving language agents.

</details>


### [316] [Quadratic Characterizations for Reachability Analysis of Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20482)
*Elias Khalife,Mazen Farhood,Pierre-Loic Garoche*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文构建了一个框架，通过在二维实平面上对标量关系进行采样并求解二次规划，生成经全局平方和验证的二次约束，从而为有界域上的非线性和不确定性提供更紧的过近似，并应用于神经网络可达性分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有二次约束（QC）在有界域上由于使用通用分析方法而过于保守，需要一种能利用域信息生成更紧约束的方法来降低保守性。

Method: 在二维实平面上对标量关系采样并求解凸二次规划生成候选二次不等式，再通过平方和（SOS）证书进行全局验证；对于非多项式关系则使用松弛多项式描述。

Result: 对于tanh等平滑激活函数，得到了域相关的二次刻画，优于通用扇区/斜率描述；对于ReLU网络，通过利用神经元间依赖性和更紧的局部界降低了可达性分析的保守性。

Conclusion: 数值实验表明该方法在平滑激活下改进了可达性结果，减少了ReLU网络的保守性，并通过饱和示例展示了超越神经网络的适用性。

Abstract: Quadratic constraints (QCs) are widely used to characterize nonlinearities and uncertainties, but generic analytical characterizations can be conservative on bounded domains. This paper develops a framework for constructing verified quadratic characterizations of scalar relations in the two-dimensional real plane. Candidate quadratic inequalities are locally generated by solving convex quadratic programs using samples from the relation and exterior sample points. They are then verified globally using sum-of-squares certificates over an exact semialgebraic description or, in the case of nonpolynomial relations, over relaxed polynomial descriptions. The resulting verified constraints define a sound overapproximation of the scalar relations over the considered domains. These constraints are directly compatible with existing analysis frameworks based on QCs and pointwise integral quadratic constraints (IQCs) for static nonlinearities and uncertainties, and they can also be embedded in QC-based semidefinite programs for reachability and safety analysis of feedforward neural networks. For smooth activations such as $\tanh$, the method yields domain-dependent quadratic characterizations that constitute an alternative to generic sector- or slope-based descriptions. For ReLU networks, we give methods to reduce conservatism in QC-based reachability analysis of feedforward networks by exploiting dependencies between neurons and tighter local bounds. Numerical examples demonstrate improved reachability results for smooth activations, reduced conservatism for ReLU networks, and applicability beyond neural networks through an example involving saturation.

</details>


### [317] [ZEBRA: Zero-shot Budgeted Resource Allocation for LLM Orchestration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20485)
*May Hamri,Inbal Talgam-Cohen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: ZEBRA是一种零样本框架，将多阶段预算分配问题转化为连续非线性背包问题，通过LLM估计每阶段效用曲线并结合水填充搜索进行最优分配，在APPS编码和HotpotQA任务上显著优于LLM直接分配。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有预算感知方法要么在单智能体内逐步控制推理，要么通过RL学习资源分配策略，但没有方法解决多智能体流水线中跨阶段预算分配的问题。作者希望填补助推时多阶段预算分配这一空白。

Method: ZEBRA将多阶段预算分配建模为连续非线性背包问题：LLM控制器估计每阶段的效用曲线，然后通过水填充搜索（water-filling search）在拉格朗日乘子上寻找最优的每阶段预算拆分。支持加法和乘法两种聚合方式，统一在同一求解器下。

Result: 在APPS编码基准（150任务）上，ZEBRA两个变体在所有聚合指标上均优于LLM直接分配。在预算α=0.5时，ZEBRA恢复94.4%的无约束质量（LLM-direct为88.1%）。在HotpotQA上，ZEBRA比LLM-direct高出14.3个百分点，且对曲线估计噪声具有鲁棒性。不同任务上的预算分配模式不同（APPS偏向精炼阶段，HotpotQA接近均衡）。

Conclusion: 轻量级的算法指导（在推理时）能够改善自主多智能体系统的经济行为，ZEBRA证明了零样本框架在多阶段预算分配中的有效性和可迁移性。

Abstract: As autonomous agents increasingly execute end-to-end tasks under fixed monetary budgets, the pressing open question shifts from whether the budget is respected, to how to spend it effectively. Existing budget-aware methods typically control reasoning step-by-step within a single agent, or learn resource allocation policies via RL. None address how to split a budget across the composing phases of a multi-agent pipeline at inference time. We propose ZEBRA, a zero-shot framework that reduces multi-phase budget allocation to a continuous nonlinear knapsack problem: an LLM controller estimates per-phase utility curves, and a water-filling search on the Lagrange multiplier returns the per-phase split. Additive and multiplicative aggregations are unified under the same solver. On a $150$-task APPS coding benchmark, both ZEBRA variants outperform LLM-direct (budget allocation directly by an LLM) on every aggregate metric. At a budget of $α= 0.5$ of the unconstrained spend, ZEBRA recovers $94.4\%$ of unconstrained quality, versus $88.1\%$ for LLM-direct. The advantage is statistically significant and transfers beyond coding: on a $3$-phase HotpotQA pipeline, ZEBRA beats LLM-direct by $14.3$pp, with allocations empirically robust to curve-estimation noise. On HotpotQA, ZEBRA arrives at a different budget split (near-balanced) compared to the APPS one (skewed towards a refinement phase), showing adaptation to the pipeline structure. More broadly, we show that lightweight algorithmic guidance at inference time can improve the economic behavior of autonomous multi-agent systems.

</details>


### [318] [A 10,000-Year Global Stochastic Tropical Cyclone Catalog with Wind-Dependent Track Transitions (WHITS)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20494)
*Jennifer Nakamura,Upmanu Lall*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出WHITS模型，一个非参数半马尔可夫热带气旋路径生成器，能够在全球六个海盆生成10,000年的合成路径目录，用于飓风灾害风险评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 历史观测记录时间短且空间稀疏，尤其是高强度登陆飓风样本极少，导致热带气旋风险评估不可靠，需要一种能生成大量物理合理路径的合成方法。

Method: 基于HITS框架进行三点改进：(1) 路径段间转移条件加入局部风速；(2) 核函数选择锐化以抑制动态不一致跳跃；(3) 在每次过渡上应用短平滑窗口消除风与位置不连续性。拟合IBTrACS六个海盆的最佳路径记录。

Result: 生成10,000年全球合成目录，能够再现各海盆观测路径密度和年度飓风/台风级别风击中概率。

Conclusion: 该目录适用于巨灾风险应用场景——大样本、低偏差且物理合理的合成路径比小样本、统计修正后的数据更有价值。

Abstract: Reliable assessment of tropical cyclone (TC) risk is limited by the brevity and spatial sparsity of the historical record, particularly for the rare, high-intensity landfalls that dominate insured loss. We present WHITS (Wind-focused Hurricane Interactive Track Simulator), a non-parametric semi-Markov track generator that extends the HITS framework of Nakamura et al. (2015) in three ways: transitions between historical track segments are conditioned on local wind speed in addition to position, age, and forward vector; the kernel selection on the comparative-vector term is sharpened to suppress dynamically inconsistent jumps; and a short smoothing window is applied across each transition to remove the position and wind discontinuities reported by downstream surge users. WHITS is fit to the full available best-track record in each of six basins in IBTrACS, extending in the North Atlantic to 1851 and in other basins to the earliest year of reliable best-track data. The resulting 10,000-yr global synthetic catalog reproduces observed track density and the annual hurricane/typhoon-force wind-hit probability across all basins. The catalog is intended for catastrophe-risk applications where a large, low-bias sample of physically plausible tracks is more useful than a small, statistically corrected one.

</details>


### [319] [Tippett-minimum Fusion of Representation-space Diffusion Models for Multi-Encoder Out-of-Distribution Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20502)
*Neelkamal Bhuyan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出EncMin2L方法，通过融合多个编码器的表示空间扩散模型（RDM）进行OOD检测，覆盖全局域变化、语义差异、纹理差异和协变量偏移四种分布漂移类型。该方法使用两个无OOD标签的诊断指标（η²和Δμ）量化编码器对特定偏移的敏感性，并结合Tippett最小p值组合策略，以2.3倍更低的参数成本超越多编码器基线，实现≥0.94 AUROC。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有OOD检测方法多针对单一或有限类型的分布偏移，缺乏对全局域变化、语义差异、纹理差异和协变量偏移等全谱分布偏移的统一处理能力。此外，多编码器融合方法通常依赖OOD标签且参数开销大，亟需一种无需OOD标签、高效且能覆盖多类型偏移的检测方案。

Method: 提出EncMin2L框架：1）对每个编码器训练独立的表示空间扩散模型（RDM）；2）从ID数据中计算两个诊断指标——η²（类条件F检验）和Δμ（合成扰动下对数似然偏移）——以无监督方式量化各编码器对不同偏移类型的敏感性；3）通过Tippett最小p值组合方法聚合多编码器的扩散似然检测分数，实现两级的min(·)门控校准。

Result: EncMin2L在四种分布偏移类型（全局域变化、语义差异、纹理差异、协变量偏移）上同时达到≥0.94 AUROC，在重叠基准测试中优于现有最优的表示空间扩散OOD检测方法，且参数成本降低2.3倍。

Conclusion: 该方法验证了通过无标签诊断指标指导多编码器融合的可行性，为全谱分布偏移下的OOD检测提供了高效且无需OOD标签的通用解决方案。

Abstract: We address out-of-distribution (OOD) detection across the full spectrum of distribution shifts -- global domain changes, semantic divergence, texture differences, and covariate corruptions -- through a multi-encoder fusion of per-encoder representation-space diffusion models (RDMs). We statistically identify each encoder's sensitivity to specific shift types from ID data alone and introduce EncMin2L -- an encoder-agnostic two-level $\min(\cdot)$-gate that combines and calibrates per-encoder diffusion-based likelihood detectors without OOD labels, outperforming monolithic multi-encoder baselines at $2.3\times$ lower parameter cost. Two ID-data diagnostics: $η^2$ (class-conditional F-test) and $Δμ$ (log-likelihood shift under synthetic corruptions) -- quantify encoder specialization, while a Tippett minimum $p$-value combination aggregates per-encoder scores into a single, calibration-stable OOD signal. EncMin2L achieves $\geq 0.94$ AUROC across all four shift types simultaneously, outperforming the state-of-the-art representation-space diffusion OOD detectors across overlapping benchmarks.

</details>


### [320] [Reinforcing Human Behavior Simulation via Verbal Feedback](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20506)
*Weiwei Sun,Xuhui Zhou,Jiarui Liu,Weihua Du,Haojia Sun,Yiqing Xie,Qianou Ma,Sihao Chen,Mengting Wan,Longqi Yang,Pei Zhou,Sherry Wu,Sean Welleck,Graham Neubig,Yiming Yang,Maarten Sap*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出DITTO，通过将自然语言反馈作为强化学习中的一等信号来训练LLM，使其更能模拟人类行为。在包含10个任务的SOUL基准测试中，DITTO相比基线平均提升36%，并在6/10任务上超越GPT-5.4。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM反馈学习主要聚焦于代码和数学等可验证领域，而人类社会学习依赖主观的、多方面的语言反馈。随着LLM越来越多用于模拟人类行为（如用户、患者、学生等角色），需要一种能处理语言反馈的新的训练范式。

Method: 提出DITTO框架，将语言反馈作为强化学习的一等信号。每次rollout后接收语言反馈并生成基于反馈改进的rollout，两者通过GRPO联合优化，将语言指导蒸馏到基础策略中，测试时无需额外反馈。

Result: 在SOUL基准（含心智理论、角色扮演、社交技能等10个任务）上，DITTO相比基线的平均提升36%，并在6/10任务上超越GPT-5.4。

Conclusion: 基于语言反馈的强化学习是训练LLM模拟人类行为的有前景方向。

Abstract: Humans learn social norms and behaviors from verbal feedback (e.g., a parent saying "that was rude" or a friend explaining "here's why that hurt"). Yet, learning from feedback for LLMs has largely focused on domains like code and math, where RL rewards are directly verifiable and condensed into scalar values. As LLMs are increasingly used to simulate human behavior, e.g., standing in for users, patients, students, and other personas, there is a pressing need to make them more human-like, which requires embracing a fundamentally different kind of signal: feedback that is verbal, subjective, and multi-faceted. We present DITTO, a model trained by treating verbal feedback as a first-class signal in reinforcement learning. After each rollout, DITTO receives verbal feedback and generates a feedback-conditioned improved rollout; both outputs are jointly optimized with GRPO, distilling verbal guidance into the base policy without requiring feedback at test time. We also introduce SOUL (Simulation gym Of hUman-Like behavior), a unified benchmark and training data suite spanning 10 tasks across six categories: Theory of Mind, character role play, social skill, learner simulation, user simulation, and persona simulation. DITTO achieves an average 36% improvement over the base model and exceeds GPT-5.4 on 6 of 10 SOUL benchmarks, demonstrating that RL with verbal feedback is a promising direction for training LLMs to simulate human behavior.

</details>


### [321] [Fast Reconstruction of Exact Maxwell Dynamics from Sparse Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20514)
*Dan DeGenaro,Xin Li,Obed Amo,Michael Pokojovy,Sarah Adel Bargal,Markus Lange-Hegermann,Bogdan Raiţă*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: FLASH-MAX是一种浅层、精确构造的神经网络架构，通过将每个隐藏神经元设计为Maxwell方程的精确解，使网络在结构上天然满足偏微分方程约束。该模型可在数秒内从约1000个稀疏点观测数据训练，达到亚1%的相对验证误差，且PDE残差为零。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有科学机器学习方法通常将物理约束作为损失函数的软惩罚项，导致需要在精度和优化速度之间进行权衡。作者希望将物理结构直接嵌入模型架构（假设类），而非损失函数，从而消除PDE残差并提升训练效率。

Method: 提出FLASH-MAX架构：浅层神经网络，每个隐藏神经元对应Maxwell方程的一个独立精确解，网络通过符号构造自动满足控制方程。训练从稀疏点观测数据端到端进行，无需计算PDE残差损失。

Result: 从约1000个稀疏点观测数据训练数秒即可达到亚1%相对验证误差；即使在3D空间中仅100个采样点，误差仍保持在个位数百分比。模型PDE残差恒为零。

Conclusion: 将控制方程结构从损失函数移入假设类（模型架构），可以显著改善科学机器学习中精度与优化速度之间的权衡关系。

Abstract: We introduce FLASH-MAX, a shallow, exact-by-construction neural network architecture for predicting homogeneous electromagnetic fields from sparse pointwise observations. Each hidden neuron represents a separate exact solution to Maxwell's equations, so that the network satisfies the governing equations symbolically by construction and can be trained end-to-end from sparse data within seconds. We prove a universal approximation result showing that this exact model class remains universal on arbitrary domains. FLASH-MAX reaches sub-1% relative validation error from about 1K sparse pointwise observations in seconds, all while maintaining a zero PDE residual, and keeps single-digit errors even for only 100 observations sampled from 3D space. These results suggest that moving governing structure from the loss into the hypothesis class can dramatically improve the trade-off between precision and optimization speed in scientific machine learning.

</details>


### [322] [Online Conformal Prediction with Corrupted Feedback](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20515)
*Bowen Wang,Matteo Zecchin,Osvaldo Simeone*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究在线共形预测在反馈被噪声、通信故障或恶意篡改破坏下的鲁棒性问题。提出了两种鲁棒方案：基于滤波的鲁棒OCP和基于主动补偿的鲁棒OCP，分别利用预测阈值的结构特性过滤被破坏的反馈，或通过主动补偿机制缓解破坏影响。两种方法均提供了显式的误覆盖保证，并在真实数据集上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有在线共形预测（OCP）方法依赖完美反馈假设来提供确定性的长期误覆盖保证，但实际应用中反馈可能被噪声、通信故障或恶意攻击破坏，导致校准性能严重退化。本文旨在解决这一现实问题。

Method: 首先将反馈破坏建模为任意二进制翻转序列，分析其对标准OCP误覆盖性能的影响。然后提出两种鲁棒方案：（1）基于滤波的鲁棒OCP，利用预测阈值的结构特性过滤被破坏的反馈；（2）基于主动补偿的鲁棒OCP，引入主动补偿机制抵消反馈破坏的影响。两种方法均给出显式误覆盖保证，并对独立随机翻转模型和带记忆边界的任意错误模型进行了专门化分析。

Result: 在真实数据集上的实验表明，所提出的两种鲁棒方法在反馈破坏下相比基线OCP方法，校准质量显著提升，且预测集更小（更高效）。

Conclusion: 本文证明了OCP在非完美反馈下的退化问题，并提出了两种有效的鲁棒替代方案，为在线共形预测在实际噪声环境中的应用提供了理论保证和实践指导。

Abstract: Modern artificial intelligence systems require calibrated uncertainty estimates that remain reliable in sequential and non-stationary environments. Online conformal prediction (OCP) addresses this challenge through adaptively updated prediction sets that provide deterministic long-run miscoverage guarantees. These guarantees, however, hinge on the assumption of perfect feedback about the coverage of past prediction sets. In practice, the observed miscoverage indicator may be corrupted by noise, communication failures, or adversarial manipulation, which can severely degrade OCP's calibration guarantees. In this paper, we study OCP under corrupted feedback. We first model feedback corruption as an arbitrary binary flip sequence, and analyze how feedback corruption affects and degrades the miscoverage performance of standard OCP. We then propose two robust schemes: robust OCP via filtering, which leverages the structural properties of the predicted threshold to filter corrupted feedback, and robust OCP via active compensation, which incorporates an active compensation mechanism to mitigate the effect of corrupted feedback. For both methods, we establish explicit miscoverage guarantees, which are further specialized for an independent stochastic flip model and for an arbitrary error model with memory bounds. Experiments on real-world datasets validate the proposed approach, showing markedly improved calibration and significantly smaller prediction sets compared with baseline OCP methods under corrupted feedback.

</details>


### [323] [An exponential mechanism based on quadratic approximations for fine-tuning machine learning models with privacy guarantees](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20521)
*Hoang Tran,Jorge Ramirez,Jiayi Wang,Alberto Bocchinfuso,Christopher Stanley,M. Paul Laiu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出基于指数机制的差分隐私微调算法，通过构造结合预训练模型局部二次近似与新数据信息的简单效用函数，实现封闭形式的多元正态分布精确采样，并引入随机投影策略处理高维模型，在MNIST和MIMIC数据集上取得了有竞争力的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 微调预训练模型时，模型容易记忆小规模敏感数据集中的个体数据点，导致隐私泄露风险，亟需一种既能有效微调又能提供严格差分隐私保证的方法。

Method: 基于指数机制构建随机化算法，设计融合预训练模型局部二次近似和新数据信息的效用函数，实现封闭形式下从多元正态分布精确采样；同时引入随机投影策略以扩展到高维模型。

Result: 在MNIST基准和MIMIC临床数据集上的数值实验表明，该方法与现有差分隐私微调技术相比具有竞争力的性能。

Conclusion: 本文提出的方法在提供严格差分隐私保证的同时，能够有效完成微调任务，且具备理论上的隐私、灵敏度和精度保证，随机投影策略使其适用于高维场景。

Abstract: Fine-tuning adapts a pretrained machine learning model to a small, sensitive dataset, but this process risks memorizing individual new data points, making the model vulnerable to adversaries who seek to extract sensitive information. In this work, we develop a randomized algorithm based on the exponential mechanism for fine-tuning while ensuring differential privacy. Our key idea is to construct a simple utility function that combines a local quadratic approximation of the pretrained model with information from the new dataset. The resulting exponential mechanism admits exact sampling from a multivariate normal distribution in closed form. We establish theoretical privacy guarantees, sensitivity bounds, and accuracy estimations for our method. We further introduce a random-projection strategy that makes the approach scalable to high-dimensional models. Numerical experiments on the MNIST benchmark and the MIMIC clinical dataset demonstrate competitive performance against existing differentially private fine-tuning techniques.

</details>


### [324] [Machine-Learning-Enhanced Non-Invasive Testing for MASLD Fibrosis: Shallow-Deep Neural Networks Versus FIB-4, Tabular Foundation Models, and Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20523)
*Athanasios Angelakis,Gabriele De Vito,Eleni-Myrto Trifylli,Filomena Ferrucci*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本研究利用三个活检确诊的MASLD队列（n=784），评估了机器学习增强的无创检测（MLE-NIT）在保持FIB-4变量空间的同时检测晚期纤维化的能力。结果表明，仅含354个可训练参数的浅层深度神经网络（s-DNN）在外部验证中表现优于FIB-4和GPT-4o，且校准良好，AST和FIB-4是最重要的变量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: FIB-4作为一线无创检测工具，其固定公式可能未充分利用年龄、AST、ALT和血小板计数中的诊断信息。作者希望通过机器学习增强的无创检测方法，在不增加临床数据需求的前提下，提升晚期纤维化的检测能力。

Method: 使用中国（486训练+54内部验证）、马来西亚和印度三个活检确诊的MASLD队列。基于五个变量（年龄、FIB-4、AST、血小板计数、ALT），比较了FIB-4、浅层深度神经网络（s-DNN）、TabPFN和微调GPT-4o四种模型的性能。

Result: 外部验证中，FIB-4的ROC-AUC在马来西亚为0.75、印度为0.60；TabPFN为0.69和0.66；GPT-4o为0.75和0.63；s-DNN为0.77和0.67。s-DNN仅354个可训练参数（TabPFN为7,244,554个），Brier分数为0.18和0.22，AST和FIB-4是最重要的变量。

Conclusion: 紧凑的非线性MLE-NIT（如s-DNN）可以在不增加临床数据需求的情况下，增强基于FIB-4的纤维化评估能力，尤其s-DNN在参数极少的情况下展现出更均衡的外部表现。

Abstract: Advanced fibrosis is a major determinant of liver-related morbidity in metabolic dysfunction-associated steatotic liver disease (MASLD). FIB-4 is widely used as a first-line non-invasive test, but its fixed formula may underuse diagnostic information contained in age, aspartate aminotransferase, alanine aminotransferase, and platelet count. We evaluated whether machine-learning-enhanced non-invasive testing (MLE-NIT) can improve advanced fibrosis detection while preserving this FIB-4 variable space.
